ui.params.sliders

Reusable slider widgets for numeric and discrete parameter controls.

   1"""Reusable slider widgets for numeric and discrete parameter controls."""
   2
   3from __future__ import annotations
   4
   5import math
   6import re
   7from typing import Any, Callable, Dict, Generic, List, Literal, Optional, Tuple, TypeVar
   8
   9import numpy as np
  10from PySide6.QtCore import QEvent, QObject, Qt
  11from PySide6.QtGui import QColor, QFontMetrics, QPainter, QPalette, QPen, QShowEvent, QTextDocument
  12from PySide6.QtWidgets import (
  13    QApplication,
  14    QCheckBox,
  15    QDialog,
  16    QDialogButtonBox,
  17    QFormLayout,
  18    QGridLayout,
  19    QHBoxLayout,
  20    QLabel,
  21    QLineEdit,

  24    QSlider,
  25    QSpinBox,
  26    QStyle,
  27    QStyleOptionSlider,

  29    QWidget,
  30)

  32from dialogs.dialogs import AskResult, show_warning, slider_ask_clamp_value, slider_ask_extend_range
  33from settings.app_style import SLIDER_BORDER_STYLE_SHEET, SliderBorderState
  34from settings.ui_defaults import SLIDER_LABEL_SIZE, UNIT_LABEL_SIZE
  35from ui.labels import SvgLabel
  36from ui.numeric_line_edit import NumericLineEdit
  37from ui.params.parameter_widget_base import ParameterWidgetBase
  38from ui.right_click_overlay import RightClickOverlay
  39from utils.helper_funcs import get_numeric_format_field, pretty_sci_text, value_to_text
  40
  41SpecialValue = Literal["+inf", "-inf"]
  42TNum = TypeVar("TNum", int, float)
  43
  44
  45def _map_val_to_pos(v: float, v_min: float, v_max: float, p_min: int, p_max: int) -> int:
  46    """Map a value linearly onto an integer slider position.
  47
  48    Args:
  49        v: Numeric value to map.
  50        v_min: Minimum numeric value of the source interval.
  51        v_max: Maximum numeric value of the source interval.
  52        p_min: Minimum integer position of the destination interval.
  53        p_max: Maximum integer position of the destination interval.
  54
  55    Returns:
  56        Rounded integer slider position.
  57
  58    Note:
  59        If ``v_min == v_max``, the mapping is degenerate and ``p_min`` is
  60        returned.
  61    """
  62    if v_max == v_min:
  63        return p_min
  64    t = (v - v_min) / (v_max - v_min)
  65    return int(round(p_min + t * (p_max - p_min)))
  66
  67
  68def _map_pos_to_val(p: int, p_min: int, p_max: int, v_min: float, v_max: float) -> float:
  69    """Map an integer slider position linearly onto a numeric value.
  70
  71    Args:
  72        p: Integer position to map.
  73        p_min: Minimum integer position of the source interval.
  74        p_max: Maximum integer position of the source interval.
  75        v_min: Minimum numeric value of the destination interval.
  76        v_max: Maximum numeric value of the destination interval.
  77
  78    Returns:
  79        Interpolated numeric value.
  80
  81    Note:
  82        If ``p_min == p_max``, the mapping is degenerate and ``v_min`` is
  83        returned.
  84    """
  85    if p_max == p_min:
  86        return v_min
  87    t = (p - p_min) / (p_max - p_min)
  88    return v_min + t * (v_max - v_min)
  89
  90
  91def make_line_edit(
  92    value_is_int: bool,
  93    init_value: TNum,
  94    fmt: str,
  95    min_limit: TNum,
  96    max_limit: TNum,
  97    min_limit_inclusive: bool,
  98    max_limit_inclusive: bool,
  99) -> NumericLineEdit:
 100    """Create a numeric line edit configured for a slider-editing dialog.
 101
 102    Args:
 103        value_is_int: Whether the editor should parse integer values.
 104        init_value: Initial value shown in the editor.
 105        fmt: Display format string associated with the slider.
 106        min_limit: Lower allowed limit.
 107        max_limit: Upper allowed limit.
 108        min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower limit is inclusive.
 109        max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper limit is inclusive.
 110
 111    Returns:
 112        Configured numeric line edit widget.
 113    """
 114    val_fmt = get_numeric_format_field(fmt)
 115    return NumericLineEdit(
 116        init_val=init_value,
 117        value_is_int=value_is_int,
 118        val_fmt=val_fmt,
 119        min_limit=min_limit,
 120        max_limit=max_limit,
 121        min_limit_inclusive=min_limit_inclusive,
 122        max_limit_inclusive=max_limit_inclusive,
 123    )
 124
 125
 126def normalize_special_value(value: Any) -> SpecialValue | None:
 127    """Normalize special infinite values to a canonical string representation.
 128
 129    Args:
 130        value: Candidate value supplied by the caller.
 131
 132    Returns:
 133        ``"+inf"`` or ``"-inf"`` when the input represents positive or negative
 134        infinity, otherwise ``None``.
 135    """
 136    if isinstance(value, str):
 137        s = value.strip().lower()
 138        if s in {"inf", "+inf", "infinity", "+infinity"}:
 139            return "+inf"
 140        if s in {"-inf", "-infinity"}:
 141            return "-inf"
 142
 143    if isinstance(value, (int, float)) and math.isinf(value):
 144        return "+inf" if value > 0 else "-inf"
 145
 146    return None
 147
 148
 149class MarkerOverlay(QWidget):
 150    """Draw a marker aligned to a slider groove.
 151
 152    The overlay is parented to a slider and paints a single line at the logical
 153    slider position returned by ``value_fn``. It is typically used to visualize
 154    a stored default value.
 155    """
 156
 157    def __init__(
 158        self,
 159        slider: QSlider,
 160        value_fn: Callable[[], int],
 161        *,
 162        thickness: int = 2,
 163        color: QColor | str = Qt.red,
 164    ):
 165        """Initialize the marker overlay.
 166
 167        Args:
 168            slider: Slider that owns the overlay.
 169            value_fn: Callable returning the logical slider position to mark.
 170            thickness: Marker line thickness in pixels.
 171            color: Marker color.
 172        """
 173        super().__init__(slider)
 174        self._slider = slider
 175        self._value_fn = value_fn
 176        self._thickness = thickness
 177        self._color = QColor(color)
 178
 179        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_TransparentForMouseEvents, True)
 180        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_NoSystemBackground, True)
 181        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_TranslucentBackground, True)
 182
 183        slider.installEventFilter(self)
 184        self._sync_geometry()
 185        self.show()
 186
 187    def _current_color(self) -> QColor:
 188        """Return the effective marker color for the current enabled state.
 189
 190        Returns:
 191            Marker color, possibly dimmed when the slider is disabled.
 192        """
 193        c = QColor(self._color)
 194        if not self._slider.isEnabled():
 195            ref = self.palette().color(QPalette.Disabled, QPalette.WindowText)
 196            c.setAlphaF(ref.alphaF())
 197        return c
 198
 199    def eventFilter(self, obj: QObject, ev: QEvent) -> bool:
 200        """Keep the overlay synchronized with slider state changes.
 201
 202        Args:
 203            obj: Watched object.
 204            ev: Event delivered to the watched object.
 205
 206        Returns:
 207            Result of the base-class event filter.
 208        """
 209        if obj is self._slider and ev.type() in (
 210            QEvent.Resize,
 211            QEvent.Show,
 212            QEvent.Hide,
 213            QEvent.EnabledChange,
 214        ):
 215            self._sync_geometry()
 216            self.update()
 217        return super().eventFilter(obj, ev)
 218
 219    def _sync_geometry(self) -> None:
 220        """Match the overlay geometry and visibility to the slider."""
 221        self.setGeometry(self._slider.rect())
 222        self.setVisible(self._slider.isVisible())
 223
 224    def paintEvent(self, _ev) -> None:
 225        """Paint the marker line at the current logical slider position.
 226
 227        Args:
 228            _ev: Paint event supplied by Qt.
 229        """
 230        opt = QStyleOptionSlider()
 231        self._slider.initStyleOption(opt)
 232
 233        style = self._slider.style()
 234        groove = style.subControlRect(QStyle.CC_Slider, opt, QStyle.SC_SliderGroove, self._slider)
 235        handle = style.subControlRect(QStyle.CC_Slider, opt, QStyle.SC_SliderHandle, self._slider)
 236        if groove.isNull() or handle.isNull():
 237            return
 238
 239        vmin, vmax = opt.minimum, opt.maximum
 240        if vmin == vmax:
 241            return
 242
 243        v = int(self._value_fn())
 244        v = max(vmin, min(vmax, v))
 245
 246        p = QPainter(self)
 247        p.setRenderHint(QPainter.Antialiasing, False)
 248
 249        pen = QPen(self._current_color())
 250        pen.setWidth(self._thickness)
 251        p.setPen(pen)
 252
 253        if opt.orientation == Qt.Horizontal:
 254            span = max(0, groove.width() - handle.width())
 255            dx = QStyle.sliderPositionFromValue(vmin, vmax, v, span, opt.upsideDown)
 256            x = groove.x() + dx + handle.width() // 2
 257            p.drawLine(x, groove.top(), x, groove.bottom())
 258        else:
 259            span = max(0, groove.height() - handle.height())
 260            dy = QStyle.sliderPositionFromValue(vmin, vmax, v, span, opt.upsideDown)
 261            y = groove.y() + dy + handle.height() // 2
 262            p.drawLine(groove.left(), y, groove.right(), y)
 263
 264        p.end()
 265
 266
 267class EditConfigDialog(QDialog, Generic[TNum]):
 268    """Dialog for editing slider range, format, and range-label visibility."""
 269
 270    def __init__(
 271        self,
 272        slider_name: str,
 273        value_is_int: bool,
 274        min_val: TNum,
 275        max_val: TNum,
 276        val_fmt: str,
 277        min_limit: TNum | None,
 278        max_limit: TNum | None,
 279        min_limit_inclusive: bool,
 280        max_limit_inclusive: bool,
 281        show_range: bool = True,
 282        show_range_enabled: bool = True,
 283        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
 284    ):
 285        """Initialize the configuration-editing dialog.
 286
 287        Args:
 288            slider_name: Display name of the slider.
 289            value_is_int: Whether the slider uses integer values.
 290            min_val: Current minimum value.
 291            max_val: Current maximum value.
 292            val_fmt: Current display format string.
 293            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
 294            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
 295            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
 296            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
 297            show_range: Initial state of the range-label checkbox.
 298            show_range_enabled: Whether the range-label checkbox is editable.
 299            parent: Optional parent widget.
 300        """
 301        super().__init__(parent)
 302        self.setWindowTitle("Edit Configuration")
 303
 304        self._show_range = show_range
 305        self._show_range_enabled = show_range_enabled
 306        self._value_is_int = value_is_int
 307        self._edit_min = make_line_edit(
 308            value_is_int, min_val, val_fmt, min_limit, max_limit, min_limit_inclusive, max_limit_inclusive
 309        )
 310        self._edit_max = make_line_edit(
 311            value_is_int, max_val, val_fmt, min_limit, max_limit, min_limit_inclusive, max_limit_inclusive
 312        )
 313        self._edit_fmt = QLineEdit(val_fmt)
 314        self._cb_ticks = QCheckBox("Show Range", self)
 315        self._cb_ticks.setChecked(show_range)
 316        self._cb_ticks.setEnabled(show_range_enabled)
 317
 318        self._edit_fmt.editingFinished.connect(self._fmt_changed)
 319
 320        buttons = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel, parent=self)
 321        buttons.accepted.connect(self.accept)
 322        buttons.rejected.connect(self.reject)
 323
 324        form = QFormLayout(self)
 325        form.addRow(
 326            "Int Slider:" if value_is_int else "Float Slider:",
 327            SvgLabel(slider_name, alignment=Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter),
 328        )
 329        form.addRow(self._cb_ticks)
 330        form.addRow("Min:", self._edit_min)
 331        form.addRow("Max:", self._edit_max)
 332        form.addRow("Format:", self._edit_fmt)
 333        form.addRow(buttons)
 334
 335        self.setSizeGripEnabled(False)
 336        self.adjustSize()
 337        self.setFixedSize(self.size())
 338
 339    def _fmt_changed(self) -> None:
 340        """Update numeric editor formats after the format field changes."""
 341        fmt = get_numeric_format_field(self._edit_fmt.text())
 342        self._edit_min.set_fmt(fmt)
 343        self._edit_max.set_fmt(fmt)
 344
 345    def accept(self):
 346        """Validate the dialog state before accepting it."""
 347        val_min = self._edit_min.get_value()
 348        val_max = self._edit_max.get_value()
 349
 350        if val_max < val_min:
 351            show_warning("Invalid range", "Min must be less than max.", parent=self)
 352            return
 353
 354        super().accept()
 355
 356    def get_values(self) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum, str, bool]:
 357        """Return the validated dialog values.
 358
 359        Returns:
 360            Tuple containing minimum value, maximum value, format string, and
 361            range-visibility flag.
 362        """
 363        return (
 364            self._edit_min.get_value(),
 365            self._edit_max.get_value(),
 366            self._edit_fmt.text(),
 367            self._cb_ticks.isChecked(),
 368        )
 369
 370    def showEvent(self, event: QShowEvent) -> None:
 371        """Focus the minimum-value editor when the dialog is shown.
 372
 373        Args:
 374            event: Qt show event.
 375        """
 376        super().showEvent(event)
 377        self._edit_min.setFocus()
 378        self._edit_min.selectAll()
 379
 380
 381class SetValueDialog(QDialog, Generic[TNum]):
 382    """Dialog for entering a new slider value."""
 383
 384    def __init__(
 385        self,
 386        slider_name: str,
 387        value_is_int: bool,
 388        current_value: TNum,
 389        val_fmt: str,
 390        min_limit: TNum | None,
 391        max_limit: TNum | None,
 392        min_limit_inclusive: bool,
 393        max_limit_inclusive: bool,
 394        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
 395    ):
 396        """Initialize the value-entry dialog.
 397
 398        Args:
 399            slider_name: Display name of the slider.
 400            value_is_int: Whether the slider uses integer values.
 401            current_value: Current value shown in the editor.
 402            val_fmt: Current display format string.
 403            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
 404            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
 405            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
 406            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
 407            parent: Optional parent widget.
 408        """
 409        super().__init__(parent)
 410        self.setWindowTitle("Set Value")
 411
 412        self._edit_value = make_line_edit(
 413            value_is_int,
 414            current_value,
 415            val_fmt,
 416            min_limit,
 417            max_limit,
 418            min_limit_inclusive,
 419            max_limit_inclusive,
 420        )
 421
 422        buttons = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel, parent=self)
 423        buttons.accepted.connect(self.accept)
 424        buttons.rejected.connect(self.reject)
 425
 426        form = QFormLayout(self)
 427        form.addRow(
 428            "Int Slider:" if value_is_int else "Float Slider:",
 429            SvgLabel(slider_name, alignment=Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter),
 430        )
 431        form.addRow("Value:", self._edit_value)
 432        form.addRow(buttons)
 433
 434        self.setSizeGripEnabled(False)
 435        self.adjustSize()
 436        self.setFixedSize(self.size())
 437
 438    def accept(self) -> None:
 439        """Validate the edited value and accept the dialog."""
 440        if not self._edit_value.hasAcceptableInput():
 441            self._edit_value._reject_exit_ui()
 442        super().accept()
 443
 444    def get_values(self) -> TNum:
 445        """Return the validated slider value.
 446
 447        Returns:
 448            Value entered in the numeric line edit.
 449        """
 450        return self._edit_value.get_value()
 451
 452    def showEvent(self, event: QShowEvent) -> None:
 453        """Focus the value editor when the dialog is shown.
 454
 455        Args:
 456            event: Qt show event.
 457        """
 458        super().showEvent(event)
 459        self._edit_value.setFocus()
 460        self._edit_value.selectAll()
 461
 462
 463class LabeledSliderBase(ParameterWidgetBase[TNum], Generic[TNum]):
 464    """Base widget combining a label, slider, value label, and optional range labels."""
 465
 466    def __init__(
 467        self,
 468        label: str,
 469        unit: str,
 470        min_val: TNum,
 471        max_val: TNum,
 472        init_val: TNum,
 473        orientation: Qt.Orientation,
 474        val_fmt: str,
 475        show_range: bool,
 476        parent: Optional[QWidget],
 477    ):
 478        """Initialize the labeled slider base widget.
 479
 480        Args:
 481            label: Slider label shown next to the control.
 482            unit: Optional unit label displayed beside the value.
 483            min_val: Initial minimum value.
 484            max_val: Initial maximum value.
 485            init_val: Initial current value.
 486            orientation: Slider orientation.
 487            val_fmt: Value display format string.
 488            show_range: Whether to show range labels and ticks.
 489            parent: Optional parent widget.
 490        """
 491        super().__init__(parent)
 492
 493        self.setObjectName("labeled_slider")
 494        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_StyledBackground, True)
 495        self.setStyleSheet(SLIDER_BORDER_STYLE_SHEET)
 496        self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
 497
 498        self._label_text = label
 499        self._unit = unit
 500        self._min_value = min_val
 501        self._max_value = max_val
 502        self._current_value = init_val
 503        self._default_value = init_val
 504        self._orient = orientation
 505        self._show_range = show_range
 506        self._val_fmt = val_fmt
 507        self._eval_fmt = ""
 508        self._use_sci_html = False
 509        self._right_click_enable = True
 510
 511        self._name_label = SvgLabel(label, parent=self, font_size=SLIDER_LABEL_SIZE)
 512        self._value_label = QLabel()
 513
 514        w = QWidget()
 515        l = QHBoxLayout(w)
 516        l.addWidget(self._value_label)
 517        l.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
 518        l.setSpacing(0)
 519        if unit:
 520            self._unit_label = SvgLabel(f"({unit})", parent=self, fix_size=True, font_size=UNIT_LABEL_SIZE)
 521            l.addWidget(self._unit_label)
 522        l.addStretch(1)
 523        self._value_and_unit = w
 524        self._min_label = QLabel()
 525        self._max_label = QLabel()
 526        self._value_label.setObjectName("slider_value")
 527        self._min_label.setObjectName("slider_range")
 528        self._max_label.setObjectName("slider_range")
 529        self._slider = QSlider(self._orient)
 530
 531        self._right_click_overlay = RightClickOverlay(
 532            target_widget=self._slider,
 533            owner_widget=self,
 534            parent=self._slider.parentWidget() if self._slider.parentWidget() is not None else self,
 535        )
 536        self._right_click_overlay.hide()
 537
 538        self._default_red_marker = MarkerOverlay(self._slider, value_fn=self._get_default_pos, thickness=2)
 539
 540        self._right_click_items: List[Dict[str, Any]] = [
 541            {"id": "save_as_default", "text": "Save as Default"},
 542            {"id": "reset_to_default", "text": "Reset to Default"},
 543        ]
 544
 545        self._name_width = self._name_label.sizeHint().width()
 546        self._value_width = 0
 547
 548        self.set_format(val_fmt)
 549        self._make_layout()
 550
 551    def _make_layout(self):
 552        """Build the internal grid layout for the current orientation."""
 553        gl = QGridLayout(self)
 554        gl.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
 555
 556        slider_wrap = QWidget()
 557        sl = QVBoxLayout(slider_wrap)
 558        sl.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
 559        sl.setSpacing(0)
 560        sl.addWidget(self._slider)
 561
 562        if self._orient == Qt.Horizontal:
 563            gl.setVerticalSpacing(0)
 564            common = Qt.AlignVCenter
 565            self._name_label.setAlignment(common | Qt.AlignRight)
 566            self._value_label.setAlignment(common | Qt.AlignRight)
 567            gl.addWidget(self._name_label, 0, 0, common | Qt.AlignRight)
 568            gl.addWidget(slider_wrap, 0, 1, 1, 3, common)
 569            gl.addWidget(self._value_and_unit, 0, 4, common | Qt.AlignLeft)
 570            gl.addWidget(self._min_label, 1, 1)
 571            gl.addWidget(self._max_label, 1, 3)
 572
 573            self.setSizePolicy(QSizePolicy.Expanding, QSizePolicy.Fixed)
 574            gl.setColumnStretch(2, 1)
 575        else:
 576            gl.setHorizontalSpacing(0)
 577            gl.setVerticalSpacing(2)
 578            common = Qt.AlignHCenter
 579            self._value_label.setAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
 580            self._name_label.setAlignment(common | Qt.AlignTop)
 581
 582            self._max_label.setContentsMargins(5, 0, 0, 0)
 583            self._min_label.setContentsMargins(5, 0, 0, 1)
 584
 585            gl.addWidget(self._value_and_unit, 0, 0, 1, 3, common | Qt.AlignBottom)
 586            gl.addWidget(slider_wrap, 1, 1, 3, 1, common)
 587            gl.addWidget(self._name_label, 4, 0, 1, 3, common | Qt.AlignTop)
 588            gl.addWidget(self._max_label, 1, 2, 1, 2)
 589            gl.addWidget(self._min_label, 3, 2, 1, 2)
 590
 591            self.setSizePolicy(QSizePolicy.Fixed, QSizePolicy.Expanding)
 592            gl.setRowStretch(2, 1)
 593
 594        self._gl = gl
 595        self._sl = sl
 596        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 597
 598    def evaluate_value(self, value: TNum) -> TNum:
 599        """Normalize a numeric value using the current evaluation format.
 600
 601        Args:
 602            value: Value to normalize.
 603
 604        Returns:
 605            Normalized typed value.
 606        """
 607        raise NotImplementedError
 608
 609    def _pos_to_value(self, pos: int) -> TNum:
 610        """Convert a slider position to a typed value.
 611
 612        Args:
 613            pos: Integer slider position.
 614
 615        Returns:
 616            Typed slider value.
 617        """
 618        raise NotImplementedError
 619
 620    def _value_to_text(self, value: TNum) -> str:
 621        """Format a typed value for display.
 622
 623        Args:
 624            value: Value to format.
 625
 626        Returns:
 627            Formatted display string.
 628        """
 629        return value_to_text(value=value, fmt=self._val_fmt)
 630
 631    def _get_default_pos(self) -> int:
 632        """Return the default marker position in slider coordinates.
 633
 634        Returns:
 635            Integer slider position for the default value.
 636        """
 637        raise NotImplementedError
 638
 639    def _update_eval_fmt(self) -> None:
 640        """Build a safe numeric format used for internal value normalization."""
 641        self._eval_fmt = get_numeric_format_field(self._val_fmt)
 642
 643    def _update_value_label(self) -> None:
 644        """Refresh the main value label from the current value."""
 645        self._value_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._current_value))
 646
 647    def _update_all_labels(self) -> None:
 648        """Refresh the main, minimum, and maximum labels."""
 649        self._value_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._current_value))
 650        self._min_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._min_value))
 651        self._max_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._max_value))
 652
 653    def _iter_width_positions(self, max_samples: int = 200) -> list[int]:
 654        """Return representative slider positions for width measurement.
 655
 656        Args:
 657            max_samples: Maximum number of sample positions to consider.
 658
 659        Returns:
 660            Sorted list of slider positions.
 661        """
 662        mn = self._slider.minimum()
 663        mx = self._slider.maximum()
 664        span = mx - mn
 665
 666        if span <= max_samples:
 667            return list(range(mn, mx + 1))
 668
 669        cand: set[int] = {mn, mx, int(self._slider.value()), int(self._get_default_pos())}
 670        n_lin = max(0, max_samples - len(cand))
 671        if n_lin > 0:
 672            for k in range(1, n_lin + 1):
 673                cand.add(mn + (span * k) // (n_lin + 1))
 674
 675        return sorted(cand)
 676
 677    def _update_value_width(self) -> None:
 678        """Measure and cache the width required for the value display."""
 679        old_w = self._value_width
 680        l = self._value_label
 681        l.ensurePolished()
 682        fmt = l.textFormat()
 683        positions = self._iter_width_positions(max_samples=200)
 684
 685        new_w = 0
 686        if fmt == Qt.PlainText:
 687            fm = QFontMetrics(l.font())
 688            for i in positions:
 689                text = self._value_to_text(self._pos_to_value(i))
 690                new_w = max(new_w, fm.horizontalAdvance(text))
 691            new_w += 5
 692        else:
 693            doc = QTextDocument()
 694            doc.setDefaultFont(l.font())
 695            doc.setTextWidth(-1)
 696            for i in positions:
 697                html = self._value_to_text(self._pos_to_value(i))
 698                doc.setHtml(html)
 699                new_w = max(new_w, int(doc.idealWidth()))
 700
 701        if self._unit:
 702            new_w += self._unit_label.sizeHint().width()
 703
 704        self._value_width = new_w
 705        self._update_layout()
 706
 707        if old_w != new_w:
 708            self.valueWidthChanged.emit(new_w)
 709
 710    def _update_layout(self):
 711        """Apply tick visibility and width constraints to the layout."""
 712        show_range = self._show_range
 713
 714        if show_range:
 715            self._slider.setTickPosition(QSlider.TicksBelow if self._orient == Qt.Horizontal else QSlider.TicksRight)
 716            mn, mx = self._slider.minimum(), self._slider.maximum()
 717            if mx > mn:
 718                self._slider.setTickInterval(max(1, mx - mn))
 719                self._max_label.show()
 720                self._min_label.show()
 721        else:
 722            self._slider.setTickPosition(QSlider.NoTicks)
 723            self._max_label.hide()
 724            self._min_label.hide()
 725
 726        if self._orient == Qt.Horizontal:
 727            self._sl.setContentsMargins(0, 8 if show_range else 0, 0, 0)
 728            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(0, self._name_width)
 729            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(4, self._value_width)
 730        else:
 731            self._sl.setContentsMargins(7 if show_range else 0, 0, 0, 0)
 732            width = max(self._name_width, self._value_width)
 733            slider_width = self._sl.sizeHint().width()
 734            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(0, max(10, (width - slider_width) // 2))
 735            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(1, slider_width)
 736            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(2, max(10, (width - slider_width) // 2))
 737
 738        self._gl.invalidate()
 739        widget = self._gl.parentWidget()
 740        if widget:
 741            widget.updateGeometry()
 742        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 743
 744    def _on_slider_value_changed(self) -> None:
 745        """Update the typed value and emit ``valueChanged`` after slider movement."""
 746        val = self._pos_to_value(self._slider.value())
 747        new_val = self.evaluate_value(val)
 748        if new_val != self._current_value:
 749            self._current_value = new_val
 750            self._update_value_label()
 751            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
 752
 753    def _update_mapping_anchors(self) -> None:
 754        """Update mapping anchors used by subclasses with adaptive mappings."""
 755        pass
 756
 757    def _set_right_click_item_checked(self, act_id, checked: bool) -> bool:
 758        """Update the stored checked state of a context-menu item.
 759
 760        Args:
 761            act_id: Menu item identifier.
 762            checked: Checked state to store.
 763
 764        Returns:
 765            ``True`` if the item was found, otherwise ``False``.
 766        """
 767        if not self._right_click_items:
 768            return False
 769
 770        for item in self._right_click_items:
 771            if item.get("id") == "sep":
 772                continue
 773            if item.get("id") == act_id:
 774                item["checkable"] = bool(item.get("checkable", True))
 775                item["checked"] = bool(checked)
 776                return True
 777        return False
 778
 779    def _set_right_click_item_enabled(self, act_id, enabled: bool) -> bool:
 780        """Update the stored enabled state of a context-menu item.
 781
 782        Args:
 783            act_id: Menu item identifier.
 784            enabled: Enabled state to store.
 785
 786        Returns:
 787            ``True`` if the item was found, otherwise ``False``.
 788        """
 789        if not self._right_click_items:
 790            return False
 791
 792        for item in self._right_click_items:
 793            if item.get("id") == "sep":
 794                continue
 795            if item.get("id") == act_id:
 796                item["enabled"] = bool(enabled)
 797                return True
 798        return False
 799
 800    def _right_click_requested(self, item_id, checked: bool) -> None:
 801        """Dispatch common context-menu actions.
 802
 803        Args:
 804            item_id: Triggered menu item identifier.
 805            checked: Checked state associated with the action.
 806        """
 807        if item_id == "save_as_default":
 808            self.save_current_value_as_default_value()
 809        elif item_id == "reset_to_default":
 810            self._reset_to_default_value()
 811
 812    def save_current_value_as_default_value(self):
 813        """Persist the current value as the default value."""
 814        pass
 815
 816    def _reset_to_default_value(self) -> None:
 817        """Reset the control to its stored default value."""
 818        pass
 819
 820    def get_value_width(self) -> int:
 821        """Return the cached width of the value display.
 822
 823        Returns:
 824            Width in pixels.
 825        """
 826        self.blockSignals(True)
 827        self._update_value_width()
 828        self.blockSignals(False)
 829        return self._value_width
 830
 831    def get_value(self) -> int | float:
 832        """Return the current typed value.
 833
 834        Returns:
 835            Current slider value.
 836        """
 837        return self._current_value
 838
 839    def set_format(self, val_fmt: str) -> None:
 840        """Set the display format used for slider values.
 841
 842        Args:
 843            val_fmt: New format string.
 844        """
 845        self._val_fmt = val_fmt
 846        self._update_eval_fmt()
 847
 848        self._current_value = self.evaluate_value(self._current_value)
 849        self._default_value = self.evaluate_value(self._default_value)
 850        self._min_value = self.evaluate_value(self._min_value)
 851        self._max_value = self.evaluate_value(self._max_value)
 852
 853        self._use_sci_html = bool(re.search(r"\{:[0-9]*\.(\d+)S\}", val_fmt))
 854        text_fmt = Qt.RichText if self._use_sci_html else Qt.PlainText
 855        self._value_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
 856        self._min_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
 857        self._max_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
 858
 859    def set_border(self, state: SliderBorderState) -> None:
 860        """Set the visual border state of the widget.
 861
 862        Args:
 863            state: Border state enum value.
 864        """
 865        state = state.value
 866        self.setProperty("borderState", state)
 867        self.style().unpolish(self)
 868        self.style().polish(self)
 869        self.update()
 870
 871    def set_right_click_enabled(self, state: bool) -> None:
 872        """Enable or disable the context menu.
 873
 874        Args:
 875            state: Whether right-click actions should be enabled.
 876        """
 877        self._right_click_enable = state
 878
 879    def set_slider_enabled(self, enabled: bool) -> None:
 880        """Enable or disable the internal slider widget.
 881
 882        Args:
 883            enabled: Whether the slider should be enabled.
 884        """
 885        self._slider.setEnabled(enabled)
 886        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 887
 888    def set_label(self, label: str) -> None:
 889        """Set the displayed slider label.
 890
 891        Args:
 892            label: New slider label text.
 893        """
 894        self._name_label.set_text(label)
 895        self._name_width = self._name_label.sizeHint().width()
 896        self.nameWidthChanged.emit(self._name_width)
 897
 898    def _show_context_menu(self, global_pos) -> None:
 899        """Build and display the context menu.
 900
 901        Args:
 902            global_pos: Global screen position where the menu should open.
 903        """
 904        if not self._right_click_enable or not self._right_click_items:
 905            return
 906
 907        self.set_border(SliderBorderState.NORMAL)
 908        QApplication.processEvents()
 909        try:
 910            menu = QMenu()
 911            item_by_id = {}
 912
 913            for item in self._right_click_items:
 914                act_id = item.get("id")
 915                if act_id == "sep":
 916                    menu.addSeparator()
 917                    continue
 918
 919                text = str(item.get("text", act_id if act_id is not None else "None"))
 920                enabled = bool(item.get("enabled", True))
 921                checkable = bool(item.get("checkable", False))
 922                checked = bool(item.get("checked", False))
 923
 924                act = menu.addAction(text)
 925                act.setEnabled(enabled)
 926                act.setCheckable(checkable)
 927                if checkable:
 928                    act.setChecked(checked)
 929                act.setData(act_id)
 930                item_by_id[act_id] = item
 931
 932            action = menu.exec(global_pos)
 933            if action is None:
 934                return
 935
 936            act_id = action.data()
 937            if act_id is None:
 938                act_id = action.text()
 939
 940            new_checked = False
 941            if action.isCheckable():
 942                old_checked = bool(item_by_id.get(act_id, {}).get("checked", action.isChecked()))
 943                new_checked = bool(action.isChecked())
 944                if new_checked == old_checked:
 945                    new_checked = not old_checked
 946                    action.setChecked(new_checked)
 947                if act_id in item_by_id:
 948                    item_by_id[act_id]["checked"] = new_checked
 949
 950            self._right_click_requested(act_id, new_checked)
 951        finally:
 952            self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
 953            QApplication.processEvents()
 954
 955    def contextMenuEvent(self, event) -> None:
 956        """Handle the Qt context-menu callback.
 957
 958        Args:
 959            event: Qt context-menu event.
 960        """
 961        self._show_context_menu(event.globalPos())
 962
 963    def resizeEvent(self, event):
 964        """Synchronize overlay geometry after the widget is resized.
 965
 966        Args:
 967            event: Qt resize event.
 968        """
 969        super().resizeEvent(event)
 970        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 971
 972    def showEvent(self, event):
 973        """Synchronize overlay geometry after the widget is shown.
 974
 975        Args:
 976            event: Qt show event.
 977        """
 978        super().showEvent(event)
 979        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 980
 981    def moveEvent(self, event):
 982        """Synchronize overlay geometry after the widget is moved.
 983
 984        Args:
 985            event: Qt move event.
 986        """
 987        super().moveEvent(event)
 988        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 989
 990    def changeEvent(self, event):
 991        """Handle enabled-state changes and refresh overlays.
 992
 993        Args:
 994            event: Qt change event.
 995        """
 996        super().changeEvent(event)
 997        if event.type() == QEvent.EnabledChange:
 998            enabled = self.isEnabled()
 999            self._slider.setEnabled(enabled)
1000            self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
1001            self._default_red_marker.update()
1002            if not enabled:
1003                self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
1004            self.update()
1005
1006
1007class NumericSliderBase(LabeledSliderBase[TNum], Generic[TNum]):
1008    """Base class for editable numeric sliders."""
1009
1010    def __init__(
1011        self,
1012        label: str,
1013        unit: str,
1014        value_is_int: bool,
1015        min_val: TNum,
1016        max_val: TNum,
1017        init_val: float | int | str,
1018        val_fmt: str,
1019        min_limit: TNum | None,
1020        max_limit: TNum | None,
1021        min_limit_inclusive: bool,
1022        max_limit_inclusive: bool,
1023        orientation: Qt.Orientation,
1024        editable: bool,
1025        show_range: bool,
1026        parent: Optional[QWidget],
1027    ):
1028        """Initialize the numeric slider base class.
1029
1030        Args:
1031            label: Slider label text.
1032            unit: Optional unit label.
1033            value_is_int: Whether the slider uses integer values.
1034            min_val: Initial minimum value.
1035            max_val: Initial maximum value.
1036            init_val: Initial current value or a special infinity marker.
1037            val_fmt: Value display format string.
1038            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
1039            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
1040            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
1041            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
1042            orientation: Slider orientation.
1043            editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled.
1044            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
1045            parent: Optional parent widget.
1046        """
1047        init_special = normalize_special_value(init_val)
1048        if init_special is not None:
1049            init_val = max_val if init_special == "+inf" else min_val
1050
1051        super().__init__(
1052            label=label,
1053            unit=unit,
1054            min_val=min_val,
1055            max_val=max_val,
1056            init_val=init_val,
1057            orientation=orientation,
1058            val_fmt=val_fmt,
1059            show_range=show_range,
1060            parent=parent,
1061        )
1062
1063        self._min_limit = min_limit
1064        self._max_limit = max_limit
1065        self._min_limit_inclusive = min_limit_inclusive
1066        self._max_limit_inclusive = max_limit_inclusive
1067
1068        self._add_right_click_items()
1069        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("edit_config", editable)
1070        self.value_is_int = value_is_int
1071
1072        self._min_value, self._max_value = self._validate_range(min_val, max_val)
1073        init_val = self._validate_value(init_val)
1074
1075        if init_special is None:
1076            if not (min_val <= init_val <= max_val):
1077                raise ValueError(f"init_val ({init_val}) must be within [{min_val}, {max_val}]")
1078        else:
1079            if init_special == "+inf" and self._max_limit is not None:
1080                raise ValueError("init_val cannot be +inf when max_limit is set")
1081            if init_special == "-inf" and self._min_limit is not None:
1082                raise ValueError("init_val cannot be -inf when min_limit is set")
1083
1084        self._current_value = init_val
1085        self._default_value = init_val
1086        self._current_special_value: SpecialValue | None = init_special
1087
1088        self._v0, self._v1 = 0.0, 0.0
1089        self._p0, self._p1 = 0, 0
1090
1091        self._setup_slider()
1092        if init_special is not None:
1093            self._enter_special_mode(init_special)
1094        else:
1095            self.set_value(self._default_value)
1096
1097        self._slider.valueChanged.connect(self._on_slider_value_changed)
1098
1099        self._update_value_width()
1100        self._update_layout()
1101        self._update_value_label()
1102
1103    def _setup_slider(self) -> None:
1104        """Configure the underlying QSlider."""
1105        raise NotImplementedError
1106
1107    def _apply_range_to_slider(self) -> None:
1108        """Apply the current numeric range to the QSlider."""
1109        pass
1110
1111    def _value_to_pos(self, value: TNum) -> int:
1112        """Map a typed numeric value to an integer slider position.
1113
1114        Args:
1115            value: Typed numeric value.
1116
1117        Returns:
1118            Integer slider position.
1119        """
1120        raise NotImplementedError
1121
1122    def _get_default_pos(self) -> int:
1123        """Return the default marker position.
1124
1125        Returns:
1126            Slider position corresponding to the default value.
1127        """
1128        return self._value_to_pos(self._default_value)
1129
1130    def value_in_limit(self, value: TNum) -> bool:
1131        """Return whether a value lies within the configured hard limits.
1132
1133        Args:
1134            value: Value to test.
1135
1136        Returns:
1137            ``True`` if the value is allowed, otherwise ``False``.
1138        """
1139        if self._min_limit is not None:
1140            if value < self._min_limit:
1141                return False
1142            elif value == self._min_limit:
1143                return self._min_limit_inclusive
1144
1145        if self._max_limit is not None:
1146            if value > self._max_limit:
1147                return False
1148            elif value == self._max_limit:
1149                return self._max_limit_inclusive
1150
1151        return True
1152
1153    def _range_err_msg(self, value_text: str) -> str:
1154        """Build an error message describing the allowed numeric interval.
1155
1156        Args:
1157            value_text: Label for the offending value.
1158
1159        Returns:
1160            Human-readable error message.
1161        """
1162        if self._min_limit is None and self._max_limit is None:
1163            return f"{value_text} is invalid."
1164
1165        min_text = "-inf" if self._min_limit is None else pretty_sci_text(self._min_limit, sig_digits=3)
1166        max_text = "+inf" if self._max_limit is None else pretty_sci_text(self._max_limit, sig_digits=3)
1167        left = "[" if self._min_limit_inclusive else "("
1168        right = "]" if self._max_limit_inclusive else ")"
1169        return f"{value_text} must be in {left}{min_text}, {max_text}{right}"
1170
1171    def _update_all_labels(self) -> None:
1172        """Refresh the value and range labels for the current numeric range."""
1173        self._update_value_label()
1174        self._min_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._min_value))
1175        self._max_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._max_value))
1176
1177    def _enter_special_mode(self, sv: SpecialValue) -> None:
1178        """Enter positive- or negative-infinity special mode.
1179
1180        Args:
1181            sv: Special value marker, either ``"+inf"`` or ``"-inf"``.
1182        """
1183        self._current_special_value = sv
1184        self.set_slider_enabled(False)
1185        self._sync_special_menu_state()
1186        self._update_value_label()
1187
1188    def _exit_special_mode(self) -> None:
1189        """Leave special infinity mode and restore slider interaction."""
1190        self._current_special_value = None
1191        self.set_slider_enabled(True)
1192        self._sync_special_menu_state()
1193        self._update_value_label()
1194
1195    def _sync_special_menu_state(self) -> None:
1196        """Synchronize context-menu checks and enabled states for special mode."""
1197        in_special = self._current_special_value is not None
1198
1199        self._set_right_click_item_checked("set_to_pos_inf", self._current_special_value == "+inf")
1200        self._set_right_click_item_checked("set_to_neg_inf", self._current_special_value == "-inf")
1201
1202        for item_id in ("set_value", "edit_config", "reset_to_default", "save_as_default"):
1203            self._set_right_click_item_enabled(item_id, not in_special)
1204
1205        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("set_to_pos_inf", True)
1206        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("set_to_neg_inf", True)
1207
1208    def _update_value_label(self) -> None:
1209        """Refresh the value label, including special infinity markers."""
1210        if self._current_special_value == "+inf":
1211            self._value_label.setText("+inf")
1212        elif self._current_special_value == "-inf":
1213            self._value_label.setText("-inf")
1214        else:
1215            self._value_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._current_value))
1216
1217    def _add_right_click_items(self):
1218        """Append numeric-slider-specific context-menu items."""
1219        items: List[Dict[str, Any]] = [
1220            {"id": "sep"},
1221            {"id": "set_value", "text": "Set Value..."},
1222        ]
1223
1224        allow_pos_inf = self._max_limit is None and self._max_limit_inclusive
1225        allow_neg_inf = self._min_limit is None and self._min_limit_inclusive
1226
1227        if allow_pos_inf:
1228            items.append(
1229                {"id": "set_to_pos_inf", "text": "Set Value to +inf", "checkable": True, "checked": False}
1230            )
1231
1232        if allow_neg_inf:
1233            items.append(
1234                {"id": "set_to_neg_inf", "text": "Set Value to -inf", "checkable": True, "checked": False}
1235            )
1236
1237        items.extend(
1238            [
1239                {"id": "sep"},
1240                {"id": "edit_config", "text": "Edit Configuration...", "enabled": True},
1241            ]
1242        )
1243
1244        self._right_click_items.extend(items)
1245
1246    def _right_click_requested(self, item_id, checked: bool) -> None:
1247        """Dispatch numeric-slider context-menu actions.
1248
1249        Args:
1250            item_id: Triggered menu item identifier.
1251            checked: Checked state associated with the action.
1252        """
1253        super()._right_click_requested(item_id, checked)
1254        if item_id == "edit_config":
1255            self._open_edit_config_dlg()
1256        elif item_id == "set_value":
1257            self._open_set_value_dlg()
1258        elif item_id == "set_to_pos_inf":
1259            if checked:
1260                self._enter_special_mode("+inf")
1261            else:
1262                self._exit_special_mode()
1263            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
1264        elif item_id == "set_to_neg_inf":
1265            if checked:
1266                self._enter_special_mode("-inf")
1267            else:
1268                self._exit_special_mode()
1269            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
1270
1271    def _open_edit_config_dlg(self) -> None:
1272        """Open the configuration dialog and apply accepted changes."""
1273        dlg = EditConfigDialog[TNum](
1274            slider_name=self._label_text,
1275            value_is_int=self.value_is_int,
1276            min_val=self._min_value,
1277            max_val=self._max_value,
1278            val_fmt=self._val_fmt,
1279            show_range=self._show_range,
1280            min_limit=self._min_limit,
1281            max_limit=self._max_limit,
1282            min_limit_inclusive=self._min_limit_inclusive,
1283            max_limit_inclusive=self._max_limit_inclusive,
1284        )
1285        if dlg.exec() != QDialog.Accepted:
1286            return
1287        new_min, new_max, new_fmt, new_show_range = dlg.get_values()
1288
1289        old_fmt = self._val_fmt
1290        old_show_range = self._show_range
1291        old_min = self._min_value
1292        old_max = self._max_value
1293
1294        self.set_format(new_fmt)
1295
1296        new_min = self.evaluate_value(new_min)
1297        new_max = self.evaluate_value(new_max)
1298        old_cur = self.evaluate_value(self._current_value)
1299        old_dft = self.evaluate_value(self._default_value)
1300
1301        needs_clamp = not (new_min <= old_cur <= new_max and new_min <= old_dft <= new_max)
1302
1303        if needs_clamp:
1304            new_cur = max(new_min, min(old_cur, new_max))
1305            new_dft = max(new_min, min(old_dft, new_max))
1306            self.set_border(SliderBorderState.ERROR)
1307            try:
1308                result = slider_ask_clamp_value(
1309                    proposed_range=f"[{self._value_to_text(new_min)}, {self._value_to_text(new_max)}]",
1310                    old_cur=self._value_to_text(old_cur),
1311                    new_cur=self._value_to_text(new_cur),
1312                    old_dft=self._value_to_text(old_dft),
1313                    new_dft=self._value_to_text(new_dft),
1314                    parent=self,
1315                )
1316            finally:
1317                self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
1318            if result != AskResult.YES:
1319                self.set_format(old_fmt)
1320                return
1321
1322        self._show_range = new_show_range
1323        self.set_range(new_min, new_max)
1324        self._update_layout()
1325        if (
1326            old_min != self._min_value
1327            or old_max != self._max_value
1328            or old_fmt != self._val_fmt
1329            or old_show_range != self._show_range
1330        ):
1331            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())
1332
1333    def _open_set_value_dlg(self) -> None:
1334        """Open the value-entry dialog and apply the accepted value."""
1335        dlg = SetValueDialog[TNum](
1336            slider_name=self._label_text,
1337            value_is_int=self.value_is_int,
1338            current_value=self._current_value,
1339            val_fmt=self._val_fmt,
1340            min_limit=self._min_limit,
1341            max_limit=self._max_limit,
1342            min_limit_inclusive=self._min_limit_inclusive,
1343            max_limit_inclusive=self._max_limit_inclusive,
1344        )
1345        if dlg.exec() != QDialog.Accepted:
1346            return
1347
1348        new_cur = self.evaluate_value(dlg.get_values())
1349
1350        old_cur = self._current_value
1351        old_dft = self._default_value
1352
1353        if not (self._min_value <= new_cur <= self._max_value):
1354            new_min = min(new_cur, self._min_value)
1355            new_max = max(new_cur, self._max_value)
1356            self.set_border(SliderBorderState.ERROR)
1357            try:
1358                result = slider_ask_extend_range(
1359                    proposed_val=self._value_to_text(new_cur),
1360                    old_range=f"[{self._value_to_text(self._min_value)}, {self._value_to_text(self._max_value)}]",
1361                    new_range=f"[{self._value_to_text(new_min)}, {self._value_to_text(new_max)}]",
1362                    parent=self,
1363                )
1364            finally:
1365                self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
1366            if result != AskResult.YES:
1367                return
1368
1369        self.set_value(new_cur)
1370
1371        if old_cur != new_cur:
1372            self.valueChanged.emit(self._current_value)
1373        new_dft = self._default_value
1374        if old_dft != new_dft:
1375            self.defaultChanged.emit(self._default_value)
1376
1377    def save_current_value_as_default_value(self):
1378        """Store the current numeric value as the default value."""
1379        self._default_value = self._current_value
1380        self.blockSignals(True)
1381        try:
1382            self._reset_to_default_value()
1383        finally:
1384            self.blockSignals(False)
1385        self.defaultChanged.emit(self._default_value)
1386
1387    def _reset_to_default_value(self) -> None:
1388        """Reset the slider to its stored default value."""
1389        self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._default_value))
1390
1391    def get_config(self) -> dict:
1392        """Return a serializable configuration snapshot.
1393
1394        Returns:
1395            Mapping containing the current range, format, and range-visibility
1396            state.
1397        """
1398        return {
1399            "min_val": self._min_value,
1400            "max_val": self._max_value,
1401            "val_fmt": self._val_fmt,
1402            "show_range": self._show_range,
1403        }
1404
1405    def _apply_config(self, config: dict) -> None:
1406        """Apply a validated configuration mapping.
1407
1408        Args:
1409            config: Configuration mapping to apply.
1410        """
1411        self._show_range = config["show_range"]
1412        self.set_format(config["val_fmt"])
1413        self.set_range(config["min_val"], config["max_val"])
1414
1415    def get_value(self):
1416        """Return the current value, including special infinity states.
1417
1418        Returns:
1419            Current numeric value, ``math.inf``, or ``-math.inf``.
1420        """
1421        if self._current_special_value == "+inf":
1422            return math.inf
1423        if self._current_special_value == "-inf":
1424            return -math.inf
1425        return self._current_value
1426
1427    def get_current_value(self) -> TNum:
1428        """Return the stored current finite value.
1429
1430        Returns:
1431            Current finite typed value.
1432        """
1433        return self._current_value
1434
1435    def get_default_value(self) -> TNum:
1436        """Return the stored default finite value.
1437
1438        Returns:
1439            Default typed value.
1440        """
1441        return self._default_value
1442
1443    def get_min_value(self) -> TNum:
1444        """Return the current minimum finite value.
1445
1446        Returns:
1447            Minimum typed value.
1448        """
1449        return self._min_value
1450
1451    def get_max_value(self) -> TNum:
1452        """Return the current maximum finite value.
1453
1454        Returns:
1455            Maximum typed value.
1456        """
1457        return self._max_value
1458
1459    def _validate_value(self, value: TNum) -> TNum:
1460        """Validate a numeric value against hard limits.
1461
1462        Args:
1463            value: Value to validate.
1464
1465        Returns:
1466            Normalized and validated typed value.
1467        """
1468        value = self.evaluate_value(value)
1469        if not self.value_in_limit(value):
1470            raise ValueError(self._range_err_msg("value"))
1471        return value
1472
1473    def _new_apply_value(self, value: TNum, keep_default_value: bool) -> None:
1474        """Apply a validated value and extend the visible range if needed.
1475
1476        Args:
1477            value: Validated value to apply.
1478            keep_default_value: Whether to preserve the current default value.
1479        """
1480        self._current_value = value
1481        if not keep_default_value:
1482            self._default_value = self._current_value
1483
1484        extended = False
1485        if value < self._min_value:
1486            self._min_value = value
1487            extended = True
1488        if value > self._max_value:
1489            self._max_value = value
1490            extended = True
1491
1492        self._update_mapping_anchors()
1493        self._apply_range_to_slider()
1494        self.blockSignals(True)
1495        try:
1496            self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._current_value))
1497        finally:
1498            self.blockSignals(False)
1499
1500        self._update_all_labels()
1501        self._update_value_width()
1502
1503        if extended:
1504            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())
1505
1506    def set_value(self, value: Any, keep_default_value: bool = False) -> None:
1507        """Set the current value, supporting special infinity markers.
1508
1509        Args:
1510            value: New value or special infinity marker.
1511            keep_default_value: Whether to leave the stored default unchanged.
1512        """
1513        sv = normalize_special_value(value)
1514        if sv is not None:
1515            self._enter_special_mode(sv)
1516            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
1517            return
1518        self._exit_special_mode()
1519
1520        validated = self._validate_value(value)
1521        self._new_apply_value(validated, keep_default_value)
1522
1523    def set_default_value(self, value: TNum) -> None:
1524        """Set the default finite value.
1525
1526        Args:
1527            value: New default value.
1528        """
1529        self._default_value = self._validate_value(value)
1530
1531        extended = False
1532        if value < self._min_value:
1533            self._min_value = value
1534            extended = True
1535        if value > self._max_value:
1536            self._max_value = value
1537            extended = True
1538
1539        self._update_mapping_anchors()
1540        self._apply_range_to_slider()
1541        self.blockSignals(True)
1542        try:
1543            self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._current_value))
1544        finally:
1545            self.blockSignals(False)
1546
1547        self._update_all_labels()
1548        self._update_value_width()
1549
1550        if extended:
1551            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())
1552
1553    def _validate_range(self, min_val: TNum, max_val: TNum) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum]:
1554        """Validate a numeric range.
1555
1556        Args:
1557            min_val: Proposed minimum value.
1558            max_val: Proposed maximum value.
1559
1560        Returns:
1561            Tuple of normalized minimum and maximum values.
1562        """
1563        min_val = self.evaluate_value(min_val)
1564        max_val = self.evaluate_value(max_val)
1565        if min_val >= max_val:
1566            raise ValueError(f"min_val ({min_val}) must be less than max_val ({max_val})")
1567
1568        if not self.value_in_limit(min_val):
1569            raise ValueError(self._range_err_msg("min_val"))
1570        if not self.value_in_limit(max_val):
1571            raise ValueError(self._range_err_msg("max_val"))
1572        return min_val, max_val
1573
1574    def set_range(self, min_val: TNum, max_val: TNum) -> None:
1575        """Set the numeric range and clamp current/default values as needed.
1576
1577        Args:
1578            min_val: New minimum value.
1579            max_val: New maximum value.
1580        """
1581        new_min_val, new_max_val = self._validate_range(min_val, max_val)
1582        self._min_value = new_min_val
1583        self._max_value = new_max_val
1584
1585        dft_clamped = False
1586        if self._current_value < new_min_val:
1587            self._current_value = new_min_val
1588        elif self._current_value > new_max_val:
1589            self._current_value = new_max_val
1590
1591        if self._default_value < new_min_val:
1592            self._default_value = new_min_val
1593            dft_clamped = True
1594        elif self._default_value > new_max_val:
1595            self._default_value = new_max_val
1596            dft_clamped = True
1597
1598        self._update_mapping_anchors()
1599        self._apply_range_to_slider()
1600        self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._current_value))
1601
1602        self._update_all_labels()
1603        self._update_value_width()
1604
1605        if dft_clamped:
1606            self.defaultChanged.emit(self._default_value)
1607
1608    def set_min_value(self, min_val: TNum) -> None:
1609        """Update only the minimum bound.
1610
1611        Args:
1612            min_val: New minimum value.
1613        """
1614        self.set_range(min_val, self._max_value)
1615
1616    def set_max_value(self, max_val: TNum) -> None:
1617        """Update only the maximum bound.
1618
1619        Args:
1620            max_val: New maximum value.
1621        """
1622        self.set_range(self._min_value, max_val)
1623
1624
1625class IntSlider(NumericSliderBase[int]):
1626    """Integer-valued slider whose QSlider range matches the numeric range directly."""
1627
1628    def __init__(
1629        self,
1630        label: str,
1631        min_val: int,
1632        max_val: int,
1633        unit: str = "",
1634        init_val: Optional[int] = None,
1635        val_fmt: str = "{:d}",
1636        min_limit: int | None = None,
1637        max_limit: int | None = None,
1638        min_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1639        max_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1640        show_range: bool = True,
1641        orientation: Qt.Orientation = Qt.Horizontal,
1642        editable: bool = True,
1643        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
1644    ):
1645        """Initialize the integer slider.
1646
1647        Args:
1648            label: Slider label text.
1649            min_val: Minimum numeric value.
1650            max_val: Maximum numeric value.
1651            unit: Optional unit label.
1652            init_val: Initial value. Defaults to the midpoint of the range.
1653            val_fmt: Integer display format string.
1654            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
1655            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
1656            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
1657            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
1658            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
1659            orientation: Slider orientation.
1660            editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled.
1661            parent: Optional parent widget.
1662        """
1663        if init_val is None:
1664            init_val = (min_val + max_val) // 2
1665
1666        super().__init__(
1667            label=label,
1668            unit=unit,
1669            value_is_int=True,
1670            min_val=min_val,
1671            max_val=max_val,
1672            init_val=init_val,
1673            val_fmt=val_fmt,
1674            min_limit=min_limit,
1675            max_limit=max_limit,
1676            min_limit_inclusive=min_limit_inclusive,
1677            max_limit_inclusive=max_limit_inclusive,
1678            orientation=orientation,
1679            show_range=show_range,
1680            editable=editable,
1681            parent=parent,
1682        )
1683
1684    def _setup_slider(self) -> None:
1685        """Configure the integer slider range and initial position."""
1686        self._slider.setRange(self._min_value, self._max_value)
1687        self._slider.setValue(self._default_value)
1688
1689    def evaluate_value(self, value: int) -> int:
1690        """Normalize an integer value using the evaluation format.
1691
1692        Args:
1693            value: Integer value to normalize.
1694
1695        Returns:
1696            Normalized integer value.
1697        """
1698        try:
1699            return int(self._eval_fmt.format(value))
1700        except Exception:
1701            return int(value)
1702
1703    def _apply_range_to_slider(self) -> None:
1704        """Apply numeric bounds directly to the underlying QSlider."""
1705        self._slider.setRange(int(self._min_value), int(self._max_value))
1706
1707    def _pos_to_value(self, pos: int) -> int:
1708        """Convert an integer slider position to a typed value.
1709
1710        Args:
1711            pos: Slider position.
1712
1713        Returns:
1714            Same integer value.
1715        """
1716        return pos
1717
1718    def _value_to_pos(self, value: int) -> int:
1719        """Convert an integer value to a slider position.
1720
1721        Args:
1722            value: Integer value.
1723
1724        Returns:
1725            Same integer position.
1726        """
1727        return value
1728
1729    def _validate_value(self, value: int) -> int:
1730        """Validate that the supplied value is an integer.
1731
1732        Args:
1733            value: Value to validate.
1734
1735        Returns:
1736            Validated integer value.
1737        """
1738        if not isinstance(value, int):
1739            raise TypeError(f"value must be int, not {type(value).__name__}")
1740        return super()._validate_value(value)
1741
1742
1743class FloatSlider(NumericSliderBase[float]):
1744    """Float-valued slider backed by an integer QSlider with piecewise mapping."""
1745
1746    def __init__(
1747        self,
1748        label: str,
1749        min_val: float,
1750        max_val: float,
1751        unit: str = "",
1752        init_val: Optional[float | str] = None,
1753        val_fmt: str = "{:.3f}",
1754        min_limit: float | None = None,
1755        max_limit: float | None = None,
1756        min_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1757        max_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1758        steps: int = 1_000_000,
1759        show_range: bool = True,
1760        orientation: Qt.Orientation = Qt.Horizontal,
1761        editable: bool = True,
1762        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
1763    ):
1764        """Initialize the float slider.
1765
1766        Args:
1767            label: Slider label text.
1768            min_val: Minimum numeric value.
1769            max_val: Maximum numeric value.
1770            unit: Optional unit label.
1771            init_val: Initial value or special infinity marker.
1772            val_fmt: Float display format string.
1773            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
1774            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
1775            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
1776            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
1777            steps: Integer slider resolution.
1778            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
1779            orientation: Slider orientation.
1780            editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled.
1781            parent: Optional parent widget.
1782        """
1783        if steps <= 0:
1784            raise ValueError("steps must be a positive integer")
1785        self._steps = steps
1786
1787        if init_val is None:
1788            init_val = 0.5 * (min_val + max_val)
1789
1790        super().__init__(
1791            label=label,
1792            unit=unit,
1793            value_is_int=False,
1794            min_val=min_val,
1795            max_val=max_val,
1796            init_val=init_val,
1797            val_fmt=val_fmt,
1798            min_limit=min_limit,
1799            max_limit=max_limit,
1800            min_limit_inclusive=min_limit_inclusive,
1801            max_limit_inclusive=max_limit_inclusive,
1802            show_range=show_range,
1803            orientation=orientation,
1804            editable=editable,
1805            parent=parent,
1806        )
1807
1808    def _setup_slider(self) -> None:
1809        """Configure the integer-backed slider range and initial position."""
1810        self._slider.setRange(0, self._steps)
1811        self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._default_value))
1812
1813    def evaluate_value(self, value: float) -> float:
1814        """Normalize a float value using the evaluation format.
1815
1816        Args:
1817            value: Float value to normalize.
1818
1819        Returns:
1820            Normalized float value.
1821        """
1822        try:
1823            return float(self._eval_fmt.format(value))
1824        except Exception:
1825            return float(value)
1826
1827    def _pos_to_value(self, pos: int) -> float:
1828        """Convert a slider position to a float via piecewise linear interpolation.
1829
1830        Args:
1831            pos: Integer slider position.
1832
1833        Returns:
1834            Interpolated float value.
1835        """
1836        v_min, v0, v1, v_max = self._min_value, self._v0, self._v1, self._max_value
1837        p_min, p0, p1, p_max = self._slider.minimum(), self._p0, self._p1, self._slider.maximum()
1838
1839        if pos <= p_min:
1840            return v_min
1841        if pos < p0:
1842            return _map_pos_to_val(pos, p_min, p0, v_min, v0)
1843        if pos == p0:
1844            return v0
1845        if pos < p1:
1846            return _map_pos_to_val(pos, p0, p1, v0, v1)
1847        if pos == p1:
1848            return v1
1849        if pos < p_max:
1850            return _map_pos_to_val(pos, p1, p_max, v1, v_max)
1851        return v_max
1852
1853    def _value_to_pos(self, value: float) -> int:
1854        """Convert a float value to a slider position via piecewise interpolation.
1855
1856        Args:
1857            value: Float value to convert.
1858
1859        Returns:
1860            Integer slider position.
1861        """
1862        v_min, v0, v1, v_max = self._min_value, self._v0, self._v1, self._max_value
1863        p_min, p0, p1, p_max = self._slider.minimum(), self._p0, self._p1, self._slider.maximum()
1864
1865        if value <= v_min:
1866            return p_min
1867        if value < v0:
1868            return _map_val_to_pos(value, v_min, v0, p_min, p0)
1869        if value == v0:
1870            return p0
1871        if value < v1:
1872            return _map_val_to_pos(value, v0, v1, p0, p1)
1873        if value == v1:
1874            return p1
1875        if value < v_max:
1876            return _map_val_to_pos(value, v1, v_max, p1, p_max)
1877        return p_max
1878
1879    def _update_mapping_anchors(self) -> None:
1880        """Update mapping anchors based on the current and default values."""
1881        val1, val2 = self._current_value, self._default_value
1882        v_min, v_max = self._min_value, self._max_value
1883        p_min, p_max = self._slider.minimum(), self._slider.maximum()
1884        v0, v1 = (val1, val2) if val1 <= val2 else (val2, val1)
1885
1886        if p_max - p_min < 3:
1887            self._p0, self._p1 = p_min, p_max
1888            self._v0, self._v1 = v0, v1
1889            return
1890
1891        lo, hi = p_min + 1, p_max - 1
1892
1893        p0 = _map_val_to_pos(v0, v_min, v_max, p_min, p_max)
1894        p1 = _map_val_to_pos(v1, v_min, v_max, p_min, p_max)
1895
1896        if v0 > v_min:
1897            p0 = max(p0, lo)
1898        if v0 < v_max:
1899            p0 = min(p0, hi)
1900
1901        if v1 > v_min:
1902            p1 = max(p1, lo)
1903        if v1 < v_max:
1904            p1 = min(p1, hi)
1905
1906        if v1 > v0 and p1 == p0:
1907            if p0 < hi:
1908                p1 = p0 + 1
1909            else:
1910                p0 = p1 - 1
1911
1912        self._p0, self._p1 = p0, p1
1913        self._v0, self._v1 = v0, v1
1914
1915    def _validate_value(self, value: float) -> float:
1916        """Validate that the supplied value is numeric.
1917
1918        Args:
1919            value: Value to validate.
1920
1921        Returns:
1922            Validated float value.
1923        """
1924        if not isinstance(value, float | int):
1925            raise TypeError(f"value must be float, not {type(value).__name__}")
1926        return super()._validate_value(value)
1927
1928
1929class ArrEditConfigDialog(QDialog):
1930    """Dialog for editing array-slider length, format, and range visibility."""
1931
1932    def __init__(
1933        self,
1934        slider_name: str,
1935        arr_length: int,
1936        val_fmt: str,
1937        show_range: bool = True,
1938        show_range_enabled: bool = True,
1939        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
1940    ):
1941        """Initialize the array-slider configuration dialog.
1942
1943        Args:
1944            slider_name: Display name of the slider.
1945            arr_length: Current array length.
1946            val_fmt: Current display format string.
1947            show_range: Initial state of the range-label checkbox.
1948            show_range_enabled: Whether the range-label checkbox is editable.
1949            parent: Optional parent widget.
1950        """
1951        super().__init__(parent)
1952        self.setWindowTitle("Configuration")
1953
1954        self._show_range = show_range
1955        self._show_range_enabled = show_range_enabled
1956        sb = QSpinBox(self)
1957        sb.setMinimum(2)
1958        sb.setMaximum(100)
1959        sb.setValue(arr_length)
1960        sb.ensurePolished()
1961        sb.setFixedSize(sb.sizeHint())
1962        self._arr_length_sb = sb
1963        self._edit_fmt = QLineEdit(val_fmt, self)
1964        self._cb_ticks = QCheckBox("Show Range", self)
1965        self._cb_ticks.setChecked(show_range)
1966        self._cb_ticks.setEnabled(show_range_enabled)
1967
1968        buttons = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel, parent=self)
1969        buttons.accepted.connect(self.accept)
1970        buttons.rejected.connect(self.reject)
1971
1972        form = QFormLayout(self)
1973        form.setFormAlignment(Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter)
1974        form.addRow("Array Slider:", SvgLabel(slider_name, alignment=Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter))
1975        form.addRow(self._cb_ticks)
1976        form.addRow("Array Length:", self._arr_length_sb)
1977        form.addRow("Format:", self._edit_fmt)
1978        form.addRow(buttons)
1979
1980        self.setSizeGripEnabled(False)
1981        self.adjustSize()
1982        self.setFixedSize(self.size())
1983
1984    def get_values(self) -> Tuple[int, str, bool]:
1985        """Return the validated dialog values.
1986
1987        Returns:
1988            Tuple containing array length, format string, and range-visibility flag.
1989        """
1990        return (
1991            self._arr_length_sb.value(),
1992            self._edit_fmt.text(),
1993            self._cb_ticks.isChecked(),
1994        )
1995
1996    def showEvent(self, event: QShowEvent) -> None:
1997        """Focus the array-length control when the dialog is shown.
1998
1999        Args:
2000            event: Qt show event.
2001        """
2002        super().showEvent(event)
2003        self._arr_length_sb.setFocus()
2004        self._arr_length_sb.selectAll()
2005
2006
2007class ArraySlider(LabeledSliderBase[float]):
2008    """Slider that selects an index from a stored numeric array."""
2009
2010    def __init__(
2011        self,
2012        label: str,
2013        arr_length: int,
2014        unit: str = "",
2015        min_val: float = 0.0,
2016        max_val: float = 1.0,
2017        init_index: int = 0,
2018        orientation: Qt.Orientation = Qt.Horizontal,
2019        val_fmt: str = "{:.2f}",
2020        show_range: bool = True,
2021        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
2022    ) -> None:
2023        """Initialize the array slider.
2024
2025        Args:
2026            label: Slider label text.
2027            arr_length: Number of array elements.
2028            unit: Optional unit label.
2029            min_val: Minimum array value.
2030            max_val: Maximum array value.
2031            init_index: Initial selected index.
2032            orientation: Slider orientation.
2033            val_fmt: Value display format string.
2034            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
2035            parent: Optional parent widget.
2036        """
2037        if arr_length < 2:
2038            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: array_length must be greater than 1.")
2039        if max_val < min_val:
2040            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: max_val must be >= min_val.")
2041
2042        self._arr = np.linspace(min_val, max_val, arr_length, dtype=float)
2043        self._arr_length = arr_length
2044        self._default_index = init_index % arr_length
2045
2046        self._current_value = self._arr[self._default_index]
2047        self._min_value = float(self._arr[0])
2048        self._max_value = float(self._arr[-1])
2049
2050        super().__init__(
2051            label=label,
2052            unit=unit,
2053            min_val=self._min_value,
2054            max_val=self._max_value,
2055            init_val=self._current_value,
2056            orientation=orientation,
2057            val_fmt=val_fmt,
2058            show_range=show_range,
2059            parent=parent,
2060        )
2061
2062        self._right_click_items.extend(
2063            [
2064                {"id": "sep"},
2065                {"id": "edit_config", "text": "Edit Configuration...", "enabled": True},
2066            ]
2067        )
2068
2069        self._slider.setRange(0, len(self._arr) - 1)
2070        self._slider.setValue(self._default_index)
2071        self.set_format(val_fmt)
2072
2073        self._slider.valueChanged.connect(self._on_slider_value_changed)
2074
2075        self._update_all_labels()
2076        self._update_value_width()
2077        self._update_layout()
2078
2079    def evaluate_value(self, value: float) -> float:
2080        """Normalize an array value using the evaluation format.
2081
2082        Args:
2083            value: Value to normalize.
2084
2085        Returns:
2086            Normalized float value.
2087        """
2088        try:
2089            return float(self._eval_fmt.format(value))
2090        except Exception:
2091            return value
2092
2093    def _pos_to_value(self, pos: int) -> float:
2094        """Return the array value at a slider position.
2095
2096        Args:
2097            pos: Slider index.
2098
2099        Returns:
2100            Array value at that index.
2101        """
2102        return float(self._arr[pos])
2103
2104    def _get_default_pos(self) -> int:
2105        """Return the default slider index.
2106
2107        Returns:
2108            Default array index.
2109        """
2110        return self._default_index
2111
2112    def _rebuild_arr(self, idx: int = -1) -> None:
2113        """Rebuild the numeric array and select an index.
2114
