2115        Args:
2116            idx: Index to select after rebuilding.
2117        """
2118        self._default_index = idx % self._arr_length
2119        self._arr = np.linspace(self._min_value, self._max_value, self._arr_length, dtype=float)
2120        self._current_value = self._arr[self._default_index]
2121        self._slider.setRange(0, len(self._arr) - 1)
2122        self._slider.setValue(self._default_index)
2123
2124    def _right_click_requested(self, item_id, checked: bool) -> None:
2125        """Dispatch array-slider context-menu actions.
2126
2127        Args:
2128            item_id: Triggered menu item identifier.
2129            checked: Checked state associated with the action.
2130        """
2131        super()._right_click_requested(item_id, checked)
2132        if item_id == "edit_config":
2133            self._open_edit_config_dlg()
2134
2135    def save_current_value_as_default_value(self) -> None:
2136        """Store the current slider index as the default index."""
2137        self._default_index = self._slider.value()
2138
2139    def _reset_to_default_value(self) -> None:
2140        """Reset the slider to the stored default index."""
2141        self._slider.setValue(self._default_index)
2142
2143    def _open_edit_config_dlg(self) -> None:
2144        """Open the array configuration dialog and apply accepted changes."""
2145        dlg = ArrEditConfigDialog(
2146            slider_name=self._label_text,
2147            arr_length=self._arr_length,
2148            val_fmt=self._val_fmt,
2149            show_range=self._show_range,
2150            parent=self,
2151        )
2152        if dlg.exec() != QDialog.Accepted:
2153            return
2154        new_arr_length, new_fmt, new_show_range = dlg.get_values()
2155
2156        old_fmt = self._val_fmt
2157        old_show_range = self._show_range
2158
2159        self.set_format(new_fmt)
2160        self._show_range = new_show_range
2161
2162        if new_arr_length != self._arr_length:
2163            self._arr_length = new_arr_length
2164            self._rebuild_arr()
2165            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
2166
2167        self._update_all_labels()
2168        self._update_value_width()
2169        self._update_layout()
2170
2171        if old_fmt != self._val_fmt or old_show_range != self._show_range:
2172            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())
2173
2174    def get_config(self) -> dict:
2175        """Return a serializable configuration snapshot.
2176
2177        Returns:
2178            Mapping containing the current range, format, and range-visibility
2179            state.
2180        """
2181        return {
2182            "min_val": self._min_value,
2183            "max_val": self._max_value,
2184            "val_fmt": self._val_fmt,
2185            "show_range": self._show_range,
2186        }
2187
2188    def _apply_config(self, config: dict) -> None:
2189        """Apply a validated configuration mapping.
2190
2191        Args:
2192            config: Configuration mapping to apply.
2193        """
2194        self._show_range = config["show_range"]
2195        self.set_format(config["val_fmt"])
2196        self.set_range(config["min_val"], config["max_val"])
2197
2198    def _apply_value(self, value: float) -> None:
2199        """Apply a validated value to the widget state.
2200
2201        Args:
2202            value: Validated value to apply.
2203
2204        Note:
2205            The array slider primarily uses index-based updates through
2206            ``set_value`` and slider movement.
2207        """
2208        _ = value
2209
2210    def get_value(self):
2211        """Return the current array-slider state.
2212
2213        Returns:
2214            Mapping containing the array length and current selected index.
2215        """
2216        return {
2217            "arr_length": len(self._arr),
2218            "index": self._slider.value(),
2219        }
2220
2221    def set_value(self, value: Dict[str, int]) -> None:
2222        """Set the array-slider state from a mapping.
2223
2224        Args:
2225            value: Mapping containing ``arr_length`` and ``index`` entries.
2226        """
2227        arr_length = value.get("arr_length", self._arr_length)
2228        if arr_length < 2:
2229            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: arr_length must be greater than 1.")
2230        index = value.get("index", self._default_index) % arr_length
2231
2232        self._arr_length = arr_length
2233        self._rebuild_arr(index)
2234        self._update_all_labels()
2235        self._update_value_width()
2236
2237    def set_range(self, min_val: TNum, max_val: TNum) -> None:
2238        """Update the numeric range used to generate the backing array.
2239
2240        Args:
2241            min_val: New minimum array value.
2242            max_val: New maximum array value.
2243        """
2244        if max_val < min_val:
2245            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: max_val must be >= min_val.")
2246
2247        self._min_value = min_val
2248        self._max_value = max_val
2249        self._rebuild_arr()
2250        self._update_all_labels()
2251        self._update_value_width()
2252
2253
2254def _demo_main() -> int:
2255    """Run this module as a standalone demo.
2256
2257    Returns:
2258        Qt application exit code.
2259    """
2260    import sys
2261    from settings.app_style import set_app_style
2262
2263    app = QApplication(sys.argv)
2264    set_app_style(app)
2265
2266    win = QWidget()
2267    win.setWindowTitle("Slider Demo (right-click name for Edit/Default)")
2268
2269    name_w = 0
2270    value_w = 0
2271
2272    def set_connections(slider: LabeledSliderBase, name: str) -> None:
2273        """Connect the demo signal handlers for a slider.
2274
2275        Args:
2276            slider: Slider widget to connect.
2277            name: Name used when printing demo output.
2278        """
2279        slider.valueChanged.connect(lambda val: on_value_changed(name, val))
2280        slider.configChanged.connect(lambda cfg: on_config_changed(name, cfg))
2281        slider.nameWidthChanged.connect(on_name_width_changed)
2282        slider.valueWidthChanged.connect(on_value_width_changed)
2283
2284    def on_value_changed(name, v):
2285        """Print value-change notifications for the demo.
2286
2287        Args:
2288            name: Slider name.
2289            v: New value.
2290        """
2291        print(f"{name} value: {v}")
2292
2293    def on_config_changed(name, cfg):
2294        """Print configuration-change notifications for the demo.
2295
2296        Args:
2297            name: Slider name.
2298            cfg: Updated configuration mapping.
2299        """
2300        print(f"{name} config: {cfg}")
2301
2302    def on_name_width_changed(new_w):
2303        """Propagate a larger label width across horizontal sliders.
2304
2305        Args:
2306            new_w: Newly required label width.
2307        """
2308        if new_w > name_w:
2309            for s in h_sliders.values():
2310                s.set_name_width(new_w)
2311
2312    def on_value_width_changed(new_w):
2313        """Propagate a larger value width across horizontal sliders.
2314
2315        Args:
2316            new_w: Newly required value width.
2317        """
2318        if new_w > value_w:
2319            for s in h_sliders.values():
2320                s.set_value_width(new_w)
2321
2322    h_sliders = {
2323        "int": IntSlider(
2324            label="n",
2325            unit="s",
2326            min_val=1,
2327            max_val=100,
2328            init_val=10,
2329            val_fmt="{:03d}",
2330            min_limit=0,
2331            min_limit_inclusive=False,
2332        ),
2333        "float1": FloatSlider(
2334            label="T_1",
2335            unit="ms",
2336            min_val=1,
2337            max_val=10,
2338            init_val=1,
2339            val_fmt="{:.2f}",
2340            min_limit=0,
2341            min_limit_inclusive=False,
2342        ),
2343        "float2": FloatSlider(
2344            label="T_2",
2345            unit="kV",
2346            min_val=-1,
2347            max_val=1,
2348            init_val=0,
2349            val_fmt="{:.2S}",
2350            show_range=False,
2351        ),
2352        "array": ArraySlider(
2353            label="z",
2354            unit="m",
2355            arr_length=2,
2356            init_index=50,
2357            val_fmt="{:.2f}",
2358        ),
2359    }
2360
2361    v_sliders = {
2362        "int": IntSlider(
2363            label="n",
2364            min_val=0,
2365            max_val=100,
2366            init_val=10,
2367            val_fmt="{:0d}",
2368            orientation=Qt.Vertical,
2369        ),
2370        "float1": FloatSlider(
2371            label="T_1",
2372            min_val=-1,
2373            max_val=1,
2374            init_val=0,
2375            val_fmt="{:.3S}",
2376            orientation=Qt.Vertical,
2377        ),
2378        "float2": FloatSlider(
2379            label="T_2",
2380            min_val=-1,
2381            max_val=1,
2382            init_val=0,
2383            val_fmt="{:.3S}",
2384            orientation=Qt.Vertical,
2385            show_range=False,
2386        ),
2387        "array": ArraySlider(
2388            label="z",
2389            arr_length=51,
2390            init_index=0,
2391            val_fmt="{:.3S}",
2392            orientation=Qt.Vertical,
2393        ),
2394    }
2395
2396    main_layout = QHBoxLayout(win)
2397    h_sliders_layout = QVBoxLayout()
2398    v_sliders_layout = QHBoxLayout()
2399
2400    main_layout.addLayout(h_sliders_layout, 1)
2401    main_layout.addLayout(v_sliders_layout, 1)
2402
2403    for name, slider in h_sliders.items():
2404        nonlocal_name_w = slider.get_name_width()
2405        nonlocal_value_w = slider.get_value_width()
2406        name_w = max(name_w, nonlocal_name_w)
2407        value_w = max(value_w, nonlocal_value_w)
2408        h_sliders_layout.addWidget(slider)
2409        set_connections(slider, name)
2410
2411    for slider in h_sliders.values():
2412        slider.set_name_width(name_w)
2413        slider.set_value_width(value_w)
2414
2415    for name, slider in v_sliders.items():
2416        v_sliders_layout.addWidget(slider)
2417        slider.valueChanged.connect(lambda val, n=name: on_value_changed(n, val))
2418
2419    win.resize(900, 150)
2420    win.show()
2421    return app.exec()
2422
2423
2424if __name__ == "__main__":
2425    raise SystemExit(_demo_main())
SpecialValue = typing.Literal['+inf', '-inf']
def make_line_edit( value_is_int: bool, init_value: ~TNum, fmt: str, min_limit: ~TNum, max_limit: ~TNum, min_limit_inclusive: bool, max_limit_inclusive: bool) -> ui.numeric_line_edit.NumericLineEdit: 
 92def make_line_edit(
 93    value_is_int: bool,
 94    init_value: TNum,
 95    fmt: str,
 96    min_limit: TNum,
 97    max_limit: TNum,
 98    min_limit_inclusive: bool,
 99    max_limit_inclusive: bool,
100) -> NumericLineEdit:
101    """Create a numeric line edit configured for a slider-editing dialog.
102
103    Args:
104        value_is_int: Whether the editor should parse integer values.
105        init_value: Initial value shown in the editor.
106        fmt: Display format string associated with the slider.
107        min_limit: Lower allowed limit.
108        max_limit: Upper allowed limit.
109        min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower limit is inclusive.
110        max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper limit is inclusive.
111
112    Returns:
113        Configured numeric line edit widget.
114    """
115    val_fmt = get_numeric_format_field(fmt)
116    return NumericLineEdit(
117        init_val=init_value,
118        value_is_int=value_is_int,
119        val_fmt=val_fmt,
120        min_limit=min_limit,
121        max_limit=max_limit,
122        min_limit_inclusive=min_limit_inclusive,
123        max_limit_inclusive=max_limit_inclusive,
124    )

Create a numeric line edit configured for a slider-editing dialog.

Args: value_is_int: Whether the editor should parse integer values. init_value: Initial value shown in the editor. fmt: Display format string associated with the slider. min_limit: Lower allowed limit. max_limit: Upper allowed limit. min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower limit is inclusive. max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper limit is inclusive.

Returns: Configured numeric line edit widget.

def normalize_special_value(value: Any) -> Optional[Literal['+inf', '-inf']]: 
127def normalize_special_value(value: Any) -> SpecialValue | None:
128    """Normalize special infinite values to a canonical string representation.
129
130    Args:
131        value: Candidate value supplied by the caller.
132
133    Returns:
134        ``"+inf"`` or ``"-inf"`` when the input represents positive or negative
135        infinity, otherwise ``None``.
136    """
137    if isinstance(value, str):
138        s = value.strip().lower()
139        if s in {"inf", "+inf", "infinity", "+infinity"}:
140            return "+inf"
141        if s in {"-inf", "-infinity"}:
142            return "-inf"
143
144    if isinstance(value, (int, float)) and math.isinf(value):
145        return "+inf" if value > 0 else "-inf"
146
147    return None

Normalize special infinite values to a canonical string representation.

Args: value: Candidate value supplied by the caller.

Returns: "+inf" or "-inf" when the input represents positive or negative infinity, otherwise None.

class MarkerOverlay(PySide6.QtWidgets.QWidget): 
150class MarkerOverlay(QWidget):
151    """Draw a marker aligned to a slider groove.
152
153    The overlay is parented to a slider and paints a single line at the logical
154    slider position returned by ``value_fn``. It is typically used to visualize
155    a stored default value.
156    """
157
158    def __init__(
159        self,
160        slider: QSlider,
161        value_fn: Callable[[], int],
162        *,
163        thickness: int = 2,
164        color: QColor | str = Qt.red,
165    ):
166        """Initialize the marker overlay.
167
168        Args:
169            slider: Slider that owns the overlay.
170            value_fn: Callable returning the logical slider position to mark.
171            thickness: Marker line thickness in pixels.
172            color: Marker color.
173        """
174        super().__init__(slider)
175        self._slider = slider
176        self._value_fn = value_fn
177        self._thickness = thickness
178        self._color = QColor(color)
179
180        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_TransparentForMouseEvents, True)
181        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_NoSystemBackground, True)
182        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_TranslucentBackground, True)
183
184        slider.installEventFilter(self)
185        self._sync_geometry()
186        self.show()
187
188    def _current_color(self) -> QColor:
189        """Return the effective marker color for the current enabled state.
190
191        Returns:
192            Marker color, possibly dimmed when the slider is disabled.
193        """
194        c = QColor(self._color)
195        if not self._slider.isEnabled():
196            ref = self.palette().color(QPalette.Disabled, QPalette.WindowText)
197            c.setAlphaF(ref.alphaF())
198        return c
199
200    def eventFilter(self, obj: QObject, ev: QEvent) -> bool:
201        """Keep the overlay synchronized with slider state changes.
202
203        Args:
204            obj: Watched object.
205            ev: Event delivered to the watched object.
206
207        Returns:
208            Result of the base-class event filter.
209        """
210        if obj is self._slider and ev.type() in (
211            QEvent.Resize,
212            QEvent.Show,
213            QEvent.Hide,
214            QEvent.EnabledChange,
215        ):
216            self._sync_geometry()
217            self.update()
218        return super().eventFilter(obj, ev)
219
220    def _sync_geometry(self) -> None:
221        """Match the overlay geometry and visibility to the slider."""
222        self.setGeometry(self._slider.rect())
223        self.setVisible(self._slider.isVisible())
224
225    def paintEvent(self, _ev) -> None:
226        """Paint the marker line at the current logical slider position.
227
228        Args:
229            _ev: Paint event supplied by Qt.
230        """
231        opt = QStyleOptionSlider()
232        self._slider.initStyleOption(opt)
233
234        style = self._slider.style()
235        groove = style.subControlRect(QStyle.CC_Slider, opt, QStyle.SC_SliderGroove, self._slider)
236        handle = style.subControlRect(QStyle.CC_Slider, opt, QStyle.SC_SliderHandle, self._slider)
237        if groove.isNull() or handle.isNull():
238            return
239
240        vmin, vmax = opt.minimum, opt.maximum
241        if vmin == vmax:
242            return
243
244        v = int(self._value_fn())
245        v = max(vmin, min(vmax, v))
246
247        p = QPainter(self)
248        p.setRenderHint(QPainter.Antialiasing, False)
249
250        pen = QPen(self._current_color())
251        pen.setWidth(self._thickness)
252        p.setPen(pen)
253
254        if opt.orientation == Qt.Horizontal:
255            span = max(0, groove.width() - handle.width())
256            dx = QStyle.sliderPositionFromValue(vmin, vmax, v, span, opt.upsideDown)
257            x = groove.x() + dx + handle.width() // 2
258            p.drawLine(x, groove.top(), x, groove.bottom())
259        else:
260            span = max(0, groove.height() - handle.height())
261            dy = QStyle.sliderPositionFromValue(vmin, vmax, v, span, opt.upsideDown)
262            y = groove.y() + dy + handle.height() // 2
263            p.drawLine(groove.left(), y, groove.right(), y)
264
265        p.end()

Draw a marker aligned to a slider groove.

The overlay is parented to a slider and paints a single line at the logical slider position returned by value_fn. It is typically used to visualize a stored default value.

MarkerOverlay( slider: PySide6.QtWidgets.QSlider, value_fn: Callable[[], int], *, thickness: int = 2, color: PySide6.QtGui.QColor | str = <GlobalColor.red: 7>) 
158    def __init__(
159        self,
160        slider: QSlider,
161        value_fn: Callable[[], int],
162        *,
163        thickness: int = 2,
164        color: QColor | str = Qt.red,
165    ):
166        """Initialize the marker overlay.
167
168        Args:
169            slider: Slider that owns the overlay.
170            value_fn: Callable returning the logical slider position to mark.
171            thickness: Marker line thickness in pixels.
172            color: Marker color.
173        """
174        super().__init__(slider)
175        self._slider = slider
176        self._value_fn = value_fn
177        self._thickness = thickness
178        self._color = QColor(color)
179
180        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_TransparentForMouseEvents, True)
181        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_NoSystemBackground, True)
182        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_TranslucentBackground, True)
183
184        slider.installEventFilter(self)
185        self._sync_geometry()
186        self.show()

Initialize the marker overlay.

Args: slider: Slider that owns the overlay. value_fn: Callable returning the logical slider position to mark. thickness: Marker line thickness in pixels. color: Marker color.

def eventFilter(self, obj: PySide6.QtCore.QObject, ev: PySide6.QtCore.QEvent) -> bool: 
200    def eventFilter(self, obj: QObject, ev: QEvent) -> bool:
201        """Keep the overlay synchronized with slider state changes.
202
203        Args:
204            obj: Watched object.
205            ev: Event delivered to the watched object.
206
207        Returns:
208            Result of the base-class event filter.
209        """
210        if obj is self._slider and ev.type() in (
211            QEvent.Resize,
212            QEvent.Show,
213            QEvent.Hide,
214            QEvent.EnabledChange,
215        ):
216            self._sync_geometry()
217            self.update()
218        return super().eventFilter(obj, ev)

Keep the overlay synchronized with slider state changes.

Args: obj: Watched object. ev: Event delivered to the watched object.

Returns: Result of the base-class event filter.

def paintEvent(self, _ev) -> None: 
225    def paintEvent(self, _ev) -> None:
226        """Paint the marker line at the current logical slider position.
227
228        Args:
229            _ev: Paint event supplied by Qt.
230        """
231        opt = QStyleOptionSlider()
232        self._slider.initStyleOption(opt)
233
234        style = self._slider.style()
235        groove = style.subControlRect(QStyle.CC_Slider, opt, QStyle.SC_SliderGroove, self._slider)
236        handle = style.subControlRect(QStyle.CC_Slider, opt, QStyle.SC_SliderHandle, self._slider)
237        if groove.isNull() or handle.isNull():
238            return
239
240        vmin, vmax = opt.minimum, opt.maximum
241        if vmin == vmax:
242            return
243
244        v = int(self._value_fn())
245        v = max(vmin, min(vmax, v))
246
247        p = QPainter(self)
248        p.setRenderHint(QPainter.Antialiasing, False)
249
250        pen = QPen(self._current_color())
251        pen.setWidth(self._thickness)
252        p.setPen(pen)
253
254        if opt.orientation == Qt.Horizontal:
255            span = max(0, groove.width() - handle.width())
256            dx = QStyle.sliderPositionFromValue(vmin, vmax, v, span, opt.upsideDown)
257            x = groove.x() + dx + handle.width() // 2
258            p.drawLine(x, groove.top(), x, groove.bottom())
259        else:
260            span = max(0, groove.height() - handle.height())
261            dy = QStyle.sliderPositionFromValue(vmin, vmax, v, span, opt.upsideDown)
262            y = groove.y() + dy + handle.height() // 2
263            p.drawLine(groove.left(), y, groove.right(), y)
264
265        p.end()

Paint the marker line at the current logical slider position.

Args: _ev: Paint event supplied by Qt.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("MarkerOverlay" inherits "QWidget": )
class EditConfigDialog(PySide6.QtWidgets.QDialog, typing.Generic[~TNum]): 
268class EditConfigDialog(QDialog, Generic[TNum]):
269    """Dialog for editing slider range, format, and range-label visibility."""
270
271    def __init__(
272        self,
273        slider_name: str,
274        value_is_int: bool,
275        min_val: TNum,
276        max_val: TNum,
277        val_fmt: str,
278        min_limit: TNum | None,
279        max_limit: TNum | None,
280        min_limit_inclusive: bool,
281        max_limit_inclusive: bool,
282        show_range: bool = True,
283        show_range_enabled: bool = True,
284        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
285    ):
286        """Initialize the configuration-editing dialog.
287
288        Args:
289            slider_name: Display name of the slider.
290            value_is_int: Whether the slider uses integer values.
291            min_val: Current minimum value.
292            max_val: Current maximum value.
293            val_fmt: Current display format string.
294            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
295            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
296            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
297            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
298            show_range: Initial state of the range-label checkbox.
299            show_range_enabled: Whether the range-label checkbox is editable.
300            parent: Optional parent widget.
301        """
302        super().__init__(parent)
303        self.setWindowTitle("Edit Configuration")
304
305        self._show_range = show_range
306        self._show_range_enabled = show_range_enabled
307        self._value_is_int = value_is_int
308        self._edit_min = make_line_edit(
309            value_is_int, min_val, val_fmt, min_limit, max_limit, min_limit_inclusive, max_limit_inclusive
310        )
311        self._edit_max = make_line_edit(
312            value_is_int, max_val, val_fmt, min_limit, max_limit, min_limit_inclusive, max_limit_inclusive
313        )
314        self._edit_fmt = QLineEdit(val_fmt)
315        self._cb_ticks = QCheckBox("Show Range", self)
316        self._cb_ticks.setChecked(show_range)
317        self._cb_ticks.setEnabled(show_range_enabled)
318
319        self._edit_fmt.editingFinished.connect(self._fmt_changed)
320
321        buttons = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel, parent=self)
322        buttons.accepted.connect(self.accept)
323        buttons.rejected.connect(self.reject)
324
325        form = QFormLayout(self)
326        form.addRow(
327            "Int Slider:" if value_is_int else "Float Slider:",
328            SvgLabel(slider_name, alignment=Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter),
329        )
330        form.addRow(self._cb_ticks)
331        form.addRow("Min:", self._edit_min)
332        form.addRow("Max:", self._edit_max)
333        form.addRow("Format:", self._edit_fmt)
334        form.addRow(buttons)
335
336        self.setSizeGripEnabled(False)
337        self.adjustSize()
338        self.setFixedSize(self.size())
339
340    def _fmt_changed(self) -> None:
341        """Update numeric editor formats after the format field changes."""
342        fmt = get_numeric_format_field(self._edit_fmt.text())
343        self._edit_min.set_fmt(fmt)
344        self._edit_max.set_fmt(fmt)
345
346    def accept(self):
347        """Validate the dialog state before accepting it."""
348        val_min = self._edit_min.get_value()
349        val_max = self._edit_max.get_value()
350
351        if val_max < val_min:
352            show_warning("Invalid range", "Min must be less than max.", parent=self)
353            return
354
355        super().accept()
356
357    def get_values(self) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum, str, bool]:
358        """Return the validated dialog values.
359
360        Returns:
361            Tuple containing minimum value, maximum value, format string, and
362            range-visibility flag.
363        """
364        return (
365            self._edit_min.get_value(),
366            self._edit_max.get_value(),
367            self._edit_fmt.text(),
368            self._cb_ticks.isChecked(),
369        )
370
371    def showEvent(self, event: QShowEvent) -> None:
372        """Focus the minimum-value editor when the dialog is shown.
373
374        Args:
375            event: Qt show event.
376        """
377        super().showEvent(event)
378        self._edit_min.setFocus()
379        self._edit_min.selectAll()

Dialog for editing slider range, format, and range-label visibility.

def get_values(self) -> Tuple[~TNum, ~TNum, str, bool]: 
357    def get_values(self) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum, str, bool]:
358        """Return the validated dialog values.
359
360        Returns:
361            Tuple containing minimum value, maximum value, format string, and
362            range-visibility flag.
363        """
364        return (
365            self._edit_min.get_value(),
366            self._edit_max.get_value(),
367            self._edit_fmt.text(),
368            self._cb_ticks.isChecked(),
369        )

Return the validated dialog values.

Returns: Tuple containing minimum value, maximum value, format string, and range-visibility flag.

class SetValueDialog(PySide6.QtWidgets.QDialog, typing.Generic[~TNum]): 
382class SetValueDialog(QDialog, Generic[TNum]):
383    """Dialog for entering a new slider value."""
384
385    def __init__(
386        self,
387        slider_name: str,
388        value_is_int: bool,
389        current_value: TNum,
390        val_fmt: str,
391        min_limit: TNum | None,
392        max_limit: TNum | None,
393        min_limit_inclusive: bool,
394        max_limit_inclusive: bool,
395        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
396    ):
397        """Initialize the value-entry dialog.
398
399        Args:
400            slider_name: Display name of the slider.
401            value_is_int: Whether the slider uses integer values.
402            current_value: Current value shown in the editor.
403            val_fmt: Current display format string.
404            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
405            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
406            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
407            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
408            parent: Optional parent widget.
409        """
410        super().__init__(parent)
411        self.setWindowTitle("Set Value")
412
413        self._edit_value = make_line_edit(
414            value_is_int,
415            current_value,
416            val_fmt,
417            min_limit,
418            max_limit,
419            min_limit_inclusive,
420            max_limit_inclusive,
421        )
422
423        buttons = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel, parent=self)
424        buttons.accepted.connect(self.accept)
425        buttons.rejected.connect(self.reject)
426
427        form = QFormLayout(self)
428        form.addRow(
429            "Int Slider:" if value_is_int else "Float Slider:",
430            SvgLabel(slider_name, alignment=Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter),
431        )
432        form.addRow("Value:", self._edit_value)
433        form.addRow(buttons)
434
435        self.setSizeGripEnabled(False)
436        self.adjustSize()
437        self.setFixedSize(self.size())
438
439    def accept(self) -> None:
440        """Validate the edited value and accept the dialog."""
441        if not self._edit_value.hasAcceptableInput():
442            self._edit_value._reject_exit_ui()
443        super().accept()
444
445    def get_values(self) -> TNum:
446        """Return the validated slider value.
447
448        Returns:
449            Value entered in the numeric line edit.
450        """
451        return self._edit_value.get_value()
452
453    def showEvent(self, event: QShowEvent) -> None:
454        """Focus the value editor when the dialog is shown.
455
456        Args:
457            event: Qt show event.
458        """
459        super().showEvent(event)
460        self._edit_value.setFocus()
461        self._edit_value.selectAll()

Dialog for entering a new slider value.

def get_values(self) -> ~TNum: 
445    def get_values(self) -> TNum:
446        """Return the validated slider value.
447
448        Returns:
449            Value entered in the numeric line edit.
450        """
451        return self._edit_value.get_value()

Return the validated slider value.

Returns: Value entered in the numeric line edit.

class LabeledSliderBase(ui.params.parameter_widget_base.ParameterWidgetBase[~TNum], typing.Generic[~TNum]): 
 464class LabeledSliderBase(ParameterWidgetBase[TNum], Generic[TNum]):
 465    """Base widget combining a label, slider, value label, and optional range labels."""
 466
 467    def __init__(
 468        self,
 469        label: str,
 470        unit: str,
 471        min_val: TNum,
 472        max_val: TNum,
 473        init_val: TNum,
 474        orientation: Qt.Orientation,
 475        val_fmt: str,
 476        show_range: bool,
 477        parent: Optional[QWidget],
 478    ):
 479        """Initialize the labeled slider base widget.
 480
 481        Args:
 482            label: Slider label shown next to the control.
 483            unit: Optional unit label displayed beside the value.
 484            min_val: Initial minimum value.
 485            max_val: Initial maximum value.
 486            init_val: Initial current value.
 487            orientation: Slider orientation.
 488            val_fmt: Value display format string.
 489            show_range: Whether to show range labels and ticks.
 490            parent: Optional parent widget.
 491        """
 492        super().__init__(parent)
 493
 494        self.setObjectName("labeled_slider")
 495        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_StyledBackground, True)
 496        self.setStyleSheet(SLIDER_BORDER_STYLE_SHEET)
 497        self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
 498
 499        self._label_text = label
 500        self._unit = unit
 501        self._min_value = min_val
 502        self._max_value = max_val
 503        self._current_value = init_val
 504        self._default_value = init_val
 505        self._orient = orientation
 506        self._show_range = show_range
 507        self._val_fmt = val_fmt
 508        self._eval_fmt = ""
 509        self._use_sci_html = False
 510        self._right_click_enable = True
 511
 512        self._name_label = SvgLabel(label, parent=self, font_size=SLIDER_LABEL_SIZE)
 513        self._value_label = QLabel()
 514
 515        w = QWidget()
 516        l = QHBoxLayout(w)
 517        l.addWidget(self._value_label)
 518        l.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
 519        l.setSpacing(0)
 520        if unit:
 521            self._unit_label = SvgLabel(f"({unit})", parent=self, fix_size=True, font_size=UNIT_LABEL_SIZE)
 522            l.addWidget(self._unit_label)
 523        l.addStretch(1)
 524        self._value_and_unit = w
 525        self._min_label = QLabel()
 526        self._max_label = QLabel()
 527        self._value_label.setObjectName("slider_value")
 528        self._min_label.setObjectName("slider_range")
 529        self._max_label.setObjectName("slider_range")
 530        self._slider = QSlider(self._orient)
 531
 532        self._right_click_overlay = RightClickOverlay(
 533            target_widget=self._slider,
 534            owner_widget=self,
 535            parent=self._slider.parentWidget() if self._slider.parentWidget() is not None else self,
 536        )
 537        self._right_click_overlay.hide()
 538
 539        self._default_red_marker = MarkerOverlay(self._slider, value_fn=self._get_default_pos, thickness=2)
 540
 541        self._right_click_items: List[Dict[str, Any]] = [
 542            {"id": "save_as_default", "text": "Save as Default"},
 543            {"id": "reset_to_default", "text": "Reset to Default"},
 544        ]
 545
 546        self._name_width = self._name_label.sizeHint().width()
 547        self._value_width = 0
 548
 549        self.set_format(val_fmt)
 550        self._make_layout()
 551
 552    def _make_layout(self):
 553        """Build the internal grid layout for the current orientation."""
 554        gl = QGridLayout(self)
 555        gl.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
 556
 557        slider_wrap = QWidget()
 558        sl = QVBoxLayout(slider_wrap)
 559        sl.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
 560        sl.setSpacing(0)
 561        sl.addWidget(self._slider)
 562
 563        if self._orient == Qt.Horizontal:
 564            gl.setVerticalSpacing(0)
 565            common = Qt.AlignVCenter
 566            self._name_label.setAlignment(common | Qt.AlignRight)
 567            self._value_label.setAlignment(common | Qt.AlignRight)
 568            gl.addWidget(self._name_label, 0, 0, common | Qt.AlignRight)
 569            gl.addWidget(slider_wrap, 0, 1, 1, 3, common)
 570            gl.addWidget(self._value_and_unit, 0, 4, common | Qt.AlignLeft)
 571            gl.addWidget(self._min_label, 1, 1)
 572            gl.addWidget(self._max_label, 1, 3)
 573
 574            self.setSizePolicy(QSizePolicy.Expanding, QSizePolicy.Fixed)
 575            gl.setColumnStretch(2, 1)
 576        else:
 577            gl.setHorizontalSpacing(0)
 578            gl.setVerticalSpacing(2)
 579            common = Qt.AlignHCenter
 580            self._value_label.setAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
 581            self._name_label.setAlignment(common | Qt.AlignTop)
 582
 583            self._max_label.setContentsMargins(5, 0, 0, 0)
 584            self._min_label.setContentsMargins(5, 0, 0, 1)
 585
 586            gl.addWidget(self._value_and_unit, 0, 0, 1, 3, common | Qt.AlignBottom)
 587            gl.addWidget(slider_wrap, 1, 1, 3, 1, common)
 588            gl.addWidget(self._name_label, 4, 0, 1, 3, common | Qt.AlignTop)
 589            gl.addWidget(self._max_label, 1, 2, 1, 2)
 590            gl.addWidget(self._min_label, 3, 2, 1, 2)
 591
 592            self.setSizePolicy(QSizePolicy.Fixed, QSizePolicy.Expanding)
 593            gl.setRowStretch(2, 1)
 594
 595        self._gl = gl
 596        self._sl = sl
 597        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 598
 599    def evaluate_value(self, value: TNum) -> TNum:
 600        """Normalize a numeric value using the current evaluation format.
 601
 602        Args:
 603            value: Value to normalize.
 604
 605        Returns:
 606            Normalized typed value.
 607        """
 608        raise NotImplementedError
 609
 610    def _pos_to_value(self, pos: int) -> TNum:
 611        """Convert a slider position to a typed value.
 612
 613        Args:
 614            pos: Integer slider position.
 615
 616        Returns:
 617            Typed slider value.
 618        """
 619        raise NotImplementedError
 620
 621    def _value_to_text(self, value: TNum) -> str:
 622        """Format a typed value for display.
 623
 624        Args:
 625            value: Value to format.
 626
 627        Returns:
 628            Formatted display string.
 629        """
 630        return value_to_text(value=value, fmt=self._val_fmt)
 631
 632    def _get_default_pos(self) -> int:
 633        """Return the default marker position in slider coordinates.
 634
 635        Returns:
 636            Integer slider position for the default value.
 637        """
 638        raise NotImplementedError
 639
 640    def _update_eval_fmt(self) -> None:
 641        """Build a safe numeric format used for internal value normalization."""
 642        self._eval_fmt = get_numeric_format_field(self._val_fmt)
 643
 644    def _update_value_label(self) -> None:
 645        """Refresh the main value label from the current value."""
 646        self._value_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._current_value))
 647
 648    def _update_all_labels(self) -> None:
 649        """Refresh the main, minimum, and maximum labels."""
 650        self._value_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._current_value))
 651        self._min_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._min_value))
 652        self._max_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._max_value))
 653
 654    def _iter_width_positions(self, max_samples: int = 200) -> list[int]:
 655        """Return representative slider positions for width measurement.
 656
 657        Args:
 658            max_samples: Maximum number of sample positions to consider.
 659
 660        Returns:
 661            Sorted list of slider positions.
 662        """
 663        mn = self._slider.minimum()
 664        mx = self._slider.maximum()
 665        span = mx - mn
 666
 667        if span <= max_samples:
 668            return list(range(mn, mx + 1))
 669
 670        cand: set[int] = {mn, mx, int(self._slider.value()), int(self._get_default_pos())}
 671        n_lin = max(0, max_samples - len(cand))
 672        if n_lin > 0:
 673            for k in range(1, n_lin + 1):
 674                cand.add(mn + (span * k) // (n_lin + 1))
 675
 676        return sorted(cand)
 677
 678    def _update_value_width(self) -> None:
 679        """Measure and cache the width required for the value display."""
 680        old_w = self._value_width
 681        l = self._value_label
 682        l.ensurePolished()
 683        fmt = l.textFormat()
 684        positions = self._iter_width_positions(max_samples=200)
 685
 686        new_w = 0
 687        if fmt == Qt.PlainText:
 688            fm = QFontMetrics(l.font())
 689            for i in positions:
 690                text = self._value_to_text(self._pos_to_value(i))
 691                new_w = max(new_w, fm.horizontalAdvance(text))
 692            new_w += 5
 693        else:
 694            doc = QTextDocument()
 695            doc.setDefaultFont(l.font())
 696            doc.setTextWidth(-1)
 697            for i in positions:
 698                html = self._value_to_text(self._pos_to_value(i))
 699                doc.setHtml(html)
 700                new_w = max(new_w, int(doc.idealWidth()))
 701
 702        if self._unit:
 703            new_w += self._unit_label.sizeHint().width()
 704
 705        self._value_width = new_w
 706        self._update_layout()
 707
 708        if old_w != new_w:
 709            self.valueWidthChanged.emit(new_w)
 710
 711    def _update_layout(self):
 712        """Apply tick visibility and width constraints to the layout."""
 713        show_range = self._show_range
 714
 715        if show_range:
 716            self._slider.setTickPosition(QSlider.TicksBelow if self._orient == Qt.Horizontal else QSlider.TicksRight)
 717            mn, mx = self._slider.minimum(), self._slider.maximum()
 718            if mx > mn:
 719                self._slider.setTickInterval(max(1, mx - mn))
 720                self._max_label.show()
 721                self._min_label.show()
 722        else:
 723            self._slider.setTickPosition(QSlider.NoTicks)
 724            self._max_label.hide()
 725            self._min_label.hide()
 726
 727        if self._orient == Qt.Horizontal:
 728            self._sl.setContentsMargins(0, 8 if show_range else 0, 0, 0)
 729            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(0, self._name_width)
 730            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(4, self._value_width)
 731        else:
 732            self._sl.setContentsMargins(7 if show_range else 0, 0, 0, 0)
 733            width = max(self._name_width, self._value_width)
 734            slider_width = self._sl.sizeHint().width()
 735            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(0, max(10, (width - slider_width) // 2))
 736            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(1, slider_width)
 737            self._gl.setColumnMinimumWidth(2, max(10, (width - slider_width) // 2))
 738
 739        self._gl.invalidate()
 740        widget = self._gl.parentWidget()
 741        if widget:
 742            widget.updateGeometry()
 743        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 744
 745    def _on_slider_value_changed(self) -> None:
 746        """Update the typed value and emit ``valueChanged`` after slider movement."""
 747        val = self._pos_to_value(self._slider.value())
 748        new_val = self.evaluate_value(val)
 749        if new_val != self._current_value:
 750            self._current_value = new_val
 751            self._update_value_label()
 752            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
 753
 754    def _update_mapping_anchors(self) -> None:
 755        """Update mapping anchors used by subclasses with adaptive mappings."""
 756        pass
 757
 758    def _set_right_click_item_checked(self, act_id, checked: bool) -> bool:
 759        """Update the stored checked state of a context-menu item.
 760
 761        Args:
 762            act_id: Menu item identifier.
 763            checked: Checked state to store.
 764
 765        Returns:
 766            ``True`` if the item was found, otherwise ``False``.
 767        """
 768        if not self._right_click_items:
 769            return False
 770
 771        for item in self._right_click_items:
 772            if item.get("id") == "sep":
 773                continue
 774            if item.get("id") == act_id:
 775                item["checkable"] = bool(item.get("checkable", True))
 776                item["checked"] = bool(checked)
 777                return True
 778        return False
 779
 780    def _set_right_click_item_enabled(self, act_id, enabled: bool) -> bool:
 781        """Update the stored enabled state of a context-menu item.
 782
 783        Args:
 784            act_id: Menu item identifier.
 785            enabled: Enabled state to store.
 786
 787        Returns:
 788            ``True`` if the item was found, otherwise ``False``.
 789        """
 790        if not self._right_click_items:
 791            return False
 792
 793        for item in self._right_click_items:
 794            if item.get("id") == "sep":
 795                continue
 796            if item.get("id") == act_id:
 797                item["enabled"] = bool(enabled)
 798                return True
 799        return False
 800
 801    def _right_click_requested(self, item_id, checked: bool) -> None:
 802        """Dispatch common context-menu actions.
 803
 804        Args:
 805            item_id: Triggered menu item identifier.
 806            checked: Checked state associated with the action.
 807        """
 808        if item_id == "save_as_default":
 809            self.save_current_value_as_default_value()
 810        elif item_id == "reset_to_default":
 811            self._reset_to_default_value()
 812
 813    def save_current_value_as_default_value(self):
 814        """Persist the current value as the default value."""
 815        pass
 816
 817    def _reset_to_default_value(self) -> None:
 818        """Reset the control to its stored default value."""
 819        pass
 820
 821    def get_value_width(self) -> int:
 822        """Return the cached width of the value display.
 823
 824        Returns:
 825            Width in pixels.
 826        """
 827        self.blockSignals(True)
 828        self._update_value_width()
 829        self.blockSignals(False)
 830        return self._value_width
 831
 832    def get_value(self) -> int | float:
 833        """Return the current typed value.
 834
 835        Returns:
 836            Current slider value.
 837        """
 838        return self._current_value
 839
 840    def set_format(self, val_fmt: str) -> None:
 841        """Set the display format used for slider values.
 842
 843        Args:
 844            val_fmt: New format string.
 845        """
 846        self._val_fmt = val_fmt
 847        self._update_eval_fmt()
 848
 849        self._current_value = self.evaluate_value(self._current_value)
 850        self._default_value = self.evaluate_value(self._default_value)
 851        self._min_value = self.evaluate_value(self._min_value)
 852        self._max_value = self.evaluate_value(self._max_value)
 853
 854        self._use_sci_html = bool(re.search(r"\{:[0-9]*\.(\d+)S\}", val_fmt))
 855        text_fmt = Qt.RichText if self._use_sci_html else Qt.PlainText
 856        self._value_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
 857        self._min_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
 858        self._max_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
 859
 860    def set_border(self, state: SliderBorderState) -> None:
 861        """Set the visual border state of the widget.
 862
 863        Args:
 864            state: Border state enum value.
 865        """
 866        state = state.value
 867        self.setProperty("borderState", state)
 868        self.style().unpolish(self)
 869        self.style().polish(self)
 870        self.update()
 871
 872    def set_right_click_enabled(self, state: bool) -> None:
 873        """Enable or disable the context menu.
 874
 875        Args:
 876            state: Whether right-click actions should be enabled.
 877        """
 878        self._right_click_enable = state
 879
 880    def set_slider_enabled(self, enabled: bool) -> None:
 881        """Enable or disable the internal slider widget.
 882
 883        Args:
 884            enabled: Whether the slider should be enabled.
 885        """
 886        self._slider.setEnabled(enabled)
 887        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 888
 889    def set_label(self, label: str) -> None:
 890        """Set the displayed slider label.
 891
 892        Args:
 893            label: New slider label text.
 894        """
 895        self._name_label.set_text(label)
 896        self._name_width = self._name_label.sizeHint().width()
 897        self.nameWidthChanged.emit(self._name_width)
 898
 899    def _show_context_menu(self, global_pos) -> None:
 900        """Build and display the context menu.
 901
 902        Args:
 903            global_pos: Global screen position where the menu should open.
 904        """
 905        if not self._right_click_enable or not self._right_click_items:
 906            return
 907
 908        self.set_border(SliderBorderState.NORMAL)
 909        QApplication.processEvents()
 910        try:
 911            menu = QMenu()
 912            item_by_id = {}
 913
 914            for item in self._right_click_items:
 915                act_id = item.get("id")
 916                if act_id == "sep":
 917                    menu.addSeparator()
 918                    continue
 919
 920                text = str(item.get("text", act_id if act_id is not None else "None"))
 921                enabled = bool(item.get("enabled", True))
 922                checkable = bool(item.get("checkable", False))
 923                checked = bool(item.get("checked", False))
 924
 925                act = menu.addAction(text)
 926                act.setEnabled(enabled)
 927                act.setCheckable(checkable)
 928                if checkable:
 929                    act.setChecked(checked)
 930                act.setData(act_id)
 931                item_by_id[act_id] = item
 932
 933            action = menu.exec(global_pos)
 934            if action is None:
 935                return
 936
 937            act_id = action.data()
 938            if act_id is None:
 939                act_id = action.text()
 940
 941            new_checked = False
 942            if action.isCheckable():
 943                old_checked = bool(item_by_id.get(act_id, {}).get("checked", action.isChecked()))
 944                new_checked = bool(action.isChecked())
 945                if new_checked == old_checked:
 946                    new_checked = not old_checked
 947                    action.setChecked(new_checked)
 948                if act_id in item_by_id:
 949                    item_by_id[act_id]["checked"] = new_checked
 950
 951            self._right_click_requested(act_id, new_checked)
 952        finally:
 953            self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
 954            QApplication.processEvents()
 955
 956    def contextMenuEvent(self, event) -> None:
 957        """Handle the Qt context-menu callback.
 958
 959        Args:
 960            event: Qt context-menu event.
 961        """
 962        self._show_context_menu(event.globalPos())
 963
 964    def resizeEvent(self, event):
 965        """Synchronize overlay geometry after the widget is resized.
 966
 967        Args:
 968            event: Qt resize event.
 969        """
 970        super().resizeEvent(event)
 971        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 972
 973    def showEvent(self, event):
 974        """Synchronize overlay geometry after the widget is shown.
 975
 976        Args:
 977            event: Qt show event.
 978        """
 979        super().showEvent(event)
 980        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 981
 982    def moveEvent(self, event):
 983        """Synchronize overlay geometry after the widget is moved.
 984
 985        Args:
 986            event: Qt move event.
 987        """
 988        super().moveEvent(event)
 989        self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
 990
 991    def changeEvent(self, event):
 992        """Handle enabled-state changes and refresh overlays.
 993
 994        Args:
 995            event: Qt change event.
 996        """
 997        super().changeEvent(event)
 998        if event.type() == QEvent.EnabledChange:
 999            enabled = self.isEnabled()
1000            self._slider.setEnabled(enabled)
1001            self._right_click_overlay.sync_to_target()
1002            self._default_red_marker.update()
1003            if not enabled:
1004                self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
1005            self.update()

Base widget combining a label, slider, value label, and optional range labels.

LabeledSliderBase( label: str, unit: str, min_val: ~TNum, max_val: ~TNum, init_val: ~TNum, orientation: PySide6.QtCore.Qt.Orientation, val_fmt: str, show_range: bool, parent: Optional[PySide6.QtWidgets.QWidget]) 
467    def __init__(
468        self,
469        label: str,
470        unit: str,
471        min_val: TNum,
472        max_val: TNum,
473        init_val: TNum,
474        orientation: Qt.Orientation,
475        val_fmt: str,
476        show_range: bool,
477        parent: Optional[QWidget],
478    ):
479        """Initialize the labeled slider base widget.
480
481        Args:
482            label: Slider label shown next to the control.
483            unit: Optional unit label displayed beside the value.
484            min_val: Initial minimum value.
485            max_val: Initial maximum value.
486            init_val: Initial current value.
487            orientation: Slider orientation.
488            val_fmt: Value display format string.
489            show_range: Whether to show range labels and ticks.
490            parent: Optional parent widget.
491        """
492        super().__init__(parent)
493
494        self.setObjectName("labeled_slider")
495        self.setAttribute(Qt.WA_StyledBackground, True)
496        self.setStyleSheet(SLIDER_BORDER_STYLE_SHEET)
497        self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
498
499        self._label_text = label
500        self._unit = unit
501        self._min_value = min_val
502        self._max_value = max_val
503        self._current_value = init_val
504        self._default_value = init_val
505        self._orient = orientation
506        self._show_range = show_range
507        self._val_fmt = val_fmt
508        self._eval_fmt = ""
509        self._use_sci_html = False
510        self._right_click_enable = True
511
512        self._name_label = SvgLabel(label, parent=self, font_size=SLIDER_LABEL_SIZE)
513        self._value_label = QLabel()
514
515        w = QWidget()
516        l = QHBoxLayout(w)
517        l.addWidget(self._value_label)
518        l.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
519        l.setSpacing(0)
520        if unit:
521            self._unit_label = SvgLabel(f"({unit})", parent=self, fix_size=True, font_size=UNIT_LABEL_SIZE)
522            l.addWidget(self._unit_label)
523        l.addStretch(1)
524        self._value_and_unit = w
525        self._min_label = QLabel()
526        self._max_label = QLabel()
527        self._value_label.setObjectName("slider_value")
528        self._min_label.setObjectName("slider_range")
529        self._max_label.setObjectName("slider_range")
530        self._slider = QSlider(self._orient)
531
532        self._right_click_overlay = RightClickOverlay(
533            target_widget=self._slider,
534            owner_widget=self,
535            parent=self._slider.parentWidget() if self._slider.parentWidget() is not None else self,
536        )
537        self._right_click_overlay.hide()
538
539        self._default_red_marker = MarkerOverlay(self._slider, value_fn=self._get_default_pos, thickness=2)
540
541        self._right_click_items: List[Dict[str, Any]] = [
542            {"id": "save_as_default", "text": "Save as Default"},
543            {"id": "reset_to_default", "text": "Reset to Default"},
544        ]
545
546        self._name_width = self._name_label.sizeHint().width()
547        self._value_width = 0
548
549        self.set_format(val_fmt)
550        self._make_layout()

Initialize the labeled slider base widget.

Args: label: Slider label shown next to the control. unit: Optional unit label displayed beside the value. min_val: Initial minimum value. max_val: Initial maximum value. init_val: Initial current value. orientation: Slider orientation. val_fmt: Value display format string. show_range: Whether to show range labels and ticks. parent: Optional parent widget.

def evaluate_value(self, value: ~TNum) -> ~TNum:

600        """Normalize a numeric value using the current evaluation format.
601
602        Args:
603            value: Value to normalize.
604
605        Returns:
606            Normalized typed value.
607        """
608        raise NotImplementedError

Normalize a numeric value using the current evaluation format.

Returns: Normalized typed value.

def save_current_value_as_default_value(self): 
813    def save_current_value_as_default_value(self):

815        pass

Persist the current value as the default value.

def get_value_width(self) -> int: 
821    def get_value_width(self) -> int:
822        """Return the cached width of the value display.
823
824        Returns:
825            Width in pixels.
826        """
827        self.blockSignals(True)
828        self._update_value_width()
829        self.blockSignals(False)
830        return self._value_width

Return the cached width of the value display.

Returns: Width in pixels.

def get_value(self) -> int | float: 
832    def get_value(self) -> int | float:
833        """Return the current typed value.
834
835        Returns:
836            Current slider value.
837        """
838        return self._current_value

Return the current typed value.

def set_format(self, val_fmt: str) -> None:

852        self._max_value = self.evaluate_value(self._max_value)
853

855        text_fmt = Qt.RichText if self._use_sci_html else Qt.PlainText
856        self._value_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
857        self._min_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)
858        self._max_label.setTextFormat(text_fmt)

def set_border(self, state: settings.app_style.SliderBorderState) -> None:

861        """Set the visual border state of the widget.
862

864            state: Border state enum value.
865        """
866        state = state.value
867        self.setProperty("borderState", state)
868        self.style().unpolish(self)
869        self.style().polish(self)
870        self.update()

Set the visual border state of the widget.

def set_right_click_enabled(self, state: bool) -> None: 
872    def set_right_click_enabled(self, state: bool) -> None:
873        """Enable or disable the context menu.
874
875        Args:
876            state: Whether right-click actions should be enabled.
877        """
878        self._right_click_enable = state

def set_slider_enabled(self, enabled: bool) -> None:
