class NumericSliderBase(ui.params.sliders.LabeledSliderBase[~TNum], typing.Generic[~TNum]): 
1008class NumericSliderBase(LabeledSliderBase[TNum], Generic[TNum]):
1009    """Base class for editable numeric sliders."""
1010
1011    def __init__(
1012        self,
1013        label: str,
1014        unit: str,
1015        value_is_int: bool,
1016        min_val: TNum,
1017        max_val: TNum,
1018        init_val: float | int | str,
1019        val_fmt: str,
1020        min_limit: TNum | None,
1021        max_limit: TNum | None,
1022        min_limit_inclusive: bool,
1023        max_limit_inclusive: bool,
1024        orientation: Qt.Orientation,
1025        editable: bool,
1026        show_range: bool,
1027        parent: Optional[QWidget],
1028    ):
1029        """Initialize the numeric slider base class.
1030
1031        Args:
1032            label: Slider label text.
1033            unit: Optional unit label.
1034            value_is_int: Whether the slider uses integer values.
1035            min_val: Initial minimum value.
1036            max_val: Initial maximum value.
1037            init_val: Initial current value or a special infinity marker.
1038            val_fmt: Value display format string.
1039            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
1040            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
1041            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
1042            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
1043            orientation: Slider orientation.
1044            editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled.
1045            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
1046            parent: Optional parent widget.
1047        """
1048        init_special = normalize_special_value(init_val)
1049        if init_special is not None:
1050            init_val = max_val if init_special == "+inf" else min_val
1051
1052        super().__init__(
1053            label=label,
1054            unit=unit,
1055            min_val=min_val,
1056            max_val=max_val,
1057            init_val=init_val,
1058            orientation=orientation,
1059            val_fmt=val_fmt,
1060            show_range=show_range,
1061            parent=parent,
1062        )
1063
1064        self._min_limit = min_limit
1065        self._max_limit = max_limit
1066        self._min_limit_inclusive = min_limit_inclusive
1067        self._max_limit_inclusive = max_limit_inclusive
1068
1069        self._add_right_click_items()
1070        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("edit_config", editable)
1071        self.value_is_int = value_is_int
1072
1073        self._min_value, self._max_value = self._validate_range(min_val, max_val)
1074        init_val = self._validate_value(init_val)
1075
1076        if init_special is None:
1077            if not (min_val <= init_val <= max_val):
1078                raise ValueError(f"init_val ({init_val}) must be within [{min_val}, {max_val}]")
1079        else:
1080            if init_special == "+inf" and self._max_limit is not None:
1081                raise ValueError("init_val cannot be +inf when max_limit is set")
1082            if init_special == "-inf" and self._min_limit is not None:
1083                raise ValueError("init_val cannot be -inf when min_limit is set")
1084
1085        self._current_value = init_val
1086        self._default_value = init_val
1087        self._current_special_value: SpecialValue | None = init_special
1088
1089        self._v0, self._v1 = 0.0, 0.0
1090        self._p0, self._p1 = 0, 0
1091
1092        self._setup_slider()
1093        if init_special is not None:
1094            self._enter_special_mode(init_special)
1095        else:
1096            self.set_value(self._default_value)
1097
1098        self._slider.valueChanged.connect(self._on_slider_value_changed)
1099
1100        self._update_value_width()
1101        self._update_layout()
1102        self._update_value_label()
1103
1104    def _setup_slider(self) -> None:
1105        """Configure the underlying QSlider."""
1106        raise NotImplementedError
1107
1108    def _apply_range_to_slider(self) -> None:
1109        """Apply the current numeric range to the QSlider."""
1110        pass
1111
1112    def _value_to_pos(self, value: TNum) -> int:
1113        """Map a typed numeric value to an integer slider position.
1114
1115        Args:
1116            value: Typed numeric value.
1117
1118        Returns:
1119            Integer slider position.
1120        """
1121        raise NotImplementedError
1122
1123    def _get_default_pos(self) -> int:
1124        """Return the default marker position.
1125
1126        Returns:
1127            Slider position corresponding to the default value.
1128        """
1129        return self._value_to_pos(self._default_value)
1130
1131    def value_in_limit(self, value: TNum) -> bool:
1132        """Return whether a value lies within the configured hard limits.
1133
1134        Args:
1135            value: Value to test.
1136
1137        Returns:
1138            ``True`` if the value is allowed, otherwise ``False``.
1139        """
1140        if self._min_limit is not None:
1141            if value < self._min_limit:
1142                return False
1143            elif value == self._min_limit:
1144                return self._min_limit_inclusive
1145
1146        if self._max_limit is not None:
1147            if value > self._max_limit:
1148                return False
1149            elif value == self._max_limit:
1150                return self._max_limit_inclusive
1151
1152        return True
1153
1154    def _range_err_msg(self, value_text: str) -> str:
1155        """Build an error message describing the allowed numeric interval.
1156
1157        Args:
1158            value_text: Label for the offending value.
1159
1160        Returns:
1161            Human-readable error message.
1162        """
1163        if self._min_limit is None and self._max_limit is None:
1164            return f"{value_text} is invalid."
1165
1166        min_text = "-inf" if self._min_limit is None else pretty_sci_text(self._min_limit, sig_digits=3)
1167        max_text = "+inf" if self._max_limit is None else pretty_sci_text(self._max_limit, sig_digits=3)
1168        left = "[" if self._min_limit_inclusive else "("
1169        right = "]" if self._max_limit_inclusive else ")"
1170        return f"{value_text} must be in {left}{min_text}, {max_text}{right}"
1171
1172    def _update_all_labels(self) -> None:
1173        """Refresh the value and range labels for the current numeric range."""
1174        self._update_value_label()
1175        self._min_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._min_value))
1176        self._max_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._max_value))
1177
1178    def _enter_special_mode(self, sv: SpecialValue) -> None:
1179        """Enter positive- or negative-infinity special mode.
1180
1181        Args:
1182            sv: Special value marker, either ``"+inf"`` or ``"-inf"``.
1183        """
1184        self._current_special_value = sv
1185        self.set_slider_enabled(False)
1186        self._sync_special_menu_state()
1187        self._update_value_label()
1188
1189    def _exit_special_mode(self) -> None:
1190        """Leave special infinity mode and restore slider interaction."""
1191        self._current_special_value = None
1192        self.set_slider_enabled(True)
1193        self._sync_special_menu_state()
1194        self._update_value_label()
1195
1196    def _sync_special_menu_state(self) -> None:
1197        """Synchronize context-menu checks and enabled states for special mode."""
1198        in_special = self._current_special_value is not None
1199
1200        self._set_right_click_item_checked("set_to_pos_inf", self._current_special_value == "+inf")
1201        self._set_right_click_item_checked("set_to_neg_inf", self._current_special_value == "-inf")
1202
1203        for item_id in ("set_value", "edit_config", "reset_to_default", "save_as_default"):
1204            self._set_right_click_item_enabled(item_id, not in_special)
1205
1206        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("set_to_pos_inf", True)
1207        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("set_to_neg_inf", True)
1208
1209    def _update_value_label(self) -> None:
1210        """Refresh the value label, including special infinity markers."""
1211        if self._current_special_value == "+inf":
1212            self._value_label.setText("+inf")
1213        elif self._current_special_value == "-inf":
1214            self._value_label.setText("-inf")
1215        else:
1216            self._value_label.setText(self._value_to_text(self._current_value))
1217
1218    def _add_right_click_items(self):
1219        """Append numeric-slider-specific context-menu items."""
1220        items: List[Dict[str, Any]] = [
1221            {"id": "sep"},
1222            {"id": "set_value", "text": "Set Value..."},
1223        ]
1224
1225        allow_pos_inf = self._max_limit is None and self._max_limit_inclusive
1226        allow_neg_inf = self._min_limit is None and self._min_limit_inclusive
1227
1228        if allow_pos_inf:
1229            items.append(
1230                {"id": "set_to_pos_inf", "text": "Set Value to +inf", "checkable": True, "checked": False}
1231            )
1232
1233        if allow_neg_inf:
1234            items.append(
1235                {"id": "set_to_neg_inf", "text": "Set Value to -inf", "checkable": True, "checked": False}
1236            )
1237
1238        items.extend(
1239            [
1240                {"id": "sep"},
1241                {"id": "edit_config", "text": "Edit Configuration...", "enabled": True},
1242            ]
1243        )
1244
1245        self._right_click_items.extend(items)
1246
1247    def _right_click_requested(self, item_id, checked: bool) -> None:
1248        """Dispatch numeric-slider context-menu actions.
1249
1250        Args:
1251            item_id: Triggered menu item identifier.
1252            checked: Checked state associated with the action.
1253        """
1254        super()._right_click_requested(item_id, checked)
1255        if item_id == "edit_config":
1256            self._open_edit_config_dlg()
1257        elif item_id == "set_value":
1258            self._open_set_value_dlg()
1259        elif item_id == "set_to_pos_inf":
1260            if checked:
1261                self._enter_special_mode("+inf")
1262            else:
1263                self._exit_special_mode()
1264            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
1265        elif item_id == "set_to_neg_inf":
1266            if checked:
1267                self._enter_special_mode("-inf")
1268            else:
1269                self._exit_special_mode()
1270            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
1271
1272    def _open_edit_config_dlg(self) -> None:
1273        """Open the configuration dialog and apply accepted changes."""
1274        dlg = EditConfigDialog[TNum](
1275            slider_name=self._label_text,
1276            value_is_int=self.value_is_int,
1277            min_val=self._min_value,
1278            max_val=self._max_value,
1279            val_fmt=self._val_fmt,
1280            show_range=self._show_range,
1281            min_limit=self._min_limit,
1282            max_limit=self._max_limit,
1283            min_limit_inclusive=self._min_limit_inclusive,
1284            max_limit_inclusive=self._max_limit_inclusive,
1285        )
1286        if dlg.exec() != QDialog.Accepted:
1287            return
1288        new_min, new_max, new_fmt, new_show_range = dlg.get_values()
1289
1290        old_fmt = self._val_fmt
1291        old_show_range = self._show_range
1292        old_min = self._min_value
1293        old_max = self._max_value
1294
1295        self.set_format(new_fmt)
1296
1297        new_min = self.evaluate_value(new_min)
1298        new_max = self.evaluate_value(new_max)
1299        old_cur = self.evaluate_value(self._current_value)
1300        old_dft = self.evaluate_value(self._default_value)
1301
1302        needs_clamp = not (new_min <= old_cur <= new_max and new_min <= old_dft <= new_max)
1303
1304        if needs_clamp:
1305            new_cur = max(new_min, min(old_cur, new_max))
1306            new_dft = max(new_min, min(old_dft, new_max))
1307            self.set_border(SliderBorderState.ERROR)
1308            try:
1309                result = slider_ask_clamp_value(
1310                    proposed_range=f"[{self._value_to_text(new_min)}, {self._value_to_text(new_max)}]",
1311                    old_cur=self._value_to_text(old_cur),
1312                    new_cur=self._value_to_text(new_cur),
1313                    old_dft=self._value_to_text(old_dft),
1314                    new_dft=self._value_to_text(new_dft),
1315                    parent=self,
1316                )
1317            finally:
1318                self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
1319            if result != AskResult.YES:
1320                self.set_format(old_fmt)
1321                return
1322
1323        self._show_range = new_show_range
1324        self.set_range(new_min, new_max)
1325        self._update_layout()
1326        if (
1327            old_min != self._min_value
1328            or old_max != self._max_value
1329            or old_fmt != self._val_fmt
1330            or old_show_range != self._show_range
1331        ):
1332            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())
1333
1334    def _open_set_value_dlg(self) -> None:
1335        """Open the value-entry dialog and apply the accepted value."""
1336        dlg = SetValueDialog[TNum](
1337            slider_name=self._label_text,
1338            value_is_int=self.value_is_int,
1339            current_value=self._current_value,
1340            val_fmt=self._val_fmt,
1341            min_limit=self._min_limit,
1342            max_limit=self._max_limit,
1343            min_limit_inclusive=self._min_limit_inclusive,
1344            max_limit_inclusive=self._max_limit_inclusive,
1345        )
1346        if dlg.exec() != QDialog.Accepted:
1347            return
1348
1349        new_cur = self.evaluate_value(dlg.get_values())
1350
1351        old_cur = self._current_value
1352        old_dft = self._default_value
1353
1354        if not (self._min_value <= new_cur <= self._max_value):
1355            new_min = min(new_cur, self._min_value)
1356            new_max = max(new_cur, self._max_value)
1357            self.set_border(SliderBorderState.ERROR)
1358            try:
1359                result = slider_ask_extend_range(
1360                    proposed_val=self._value_to_text(new_cur),
1361                    old_range=f"[{self._value_to_text(self._min_value)}, {self._value_to_text(self._max_value)}]",
1362                    new_range=f"[{self._value_to_text(new_min)}, {self._value_to_text(new_max)}]",
1363                    parent=self,
1364                )
1365            finally:
1366                self.set_border(SliderBorderState.OFF)
1367            if result != AskResult.YES:
1368                return
1369
1370        self.set_value(new_cur)
1371
1372        if old_cur != new_cur:
1373            self.valueChanged.emit(self._current_value)
1374        new_dft = self._default_value
1375        if old_dft != new_dft:
1376            self.defaultChanged.emit(self._default_value)
1377
1378    def save_current_value_as_default_value(self):
1379        """Store the current numeric value as the default value."""
1380        self._default_value = self._current_value
1381        self.blockSignals(True)
1382        try:
1383            self._reset_to_default_value()
1384        finally:
1385            self.blockSignals(False)
1386        self.defaultChanged.emit(self._default_value)
1387
1388    def _reset_to_default_value(self) -> None:
1389        """Reset the slider to its stored default value."""
1390        self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._default_value))
1391
1392    def get_config(self) -> dict:
1393        """Return a serializable configuration snapshot.
1394
1395        Returns:
1396            Mapping containing the current range, format, and range-visibility
1397            state.
1398        """
1399        return {
1400            "min_val": self._min_value,
1401            "max_val": self._max_value,
1402            "val_fmt": self._val_fmt,
1403            "show_range": self._show_range,
1404        }
1405
1406    def _apply_config(self, config: dict) -> None:
1407        """Apply a validated configuration mapping.
1408
1409        Args:
1410            config: Configuration mapping to apply.
1411        """
1412        self._show_range = config["show_range"]
1413        self.set_format(config["val_fmt"])
1414        self.set_range(config["min_val"], config["max_val"])
1415
1416    def get_value(self):
1417        """Return the current value, including special infinity states.
1418
1419        Returns:
1420            Current numeric value, ``math.inf``, or ``-math.inf``.
1421        """
1422        if self._current_special_value == "+inf":
1423            return math.inf
1424        if self._current_special_value == "-inf":
1425            return -math.inf
1426        return self._current_value
1427
1428    def get_current_value(self) -> TNum:
1429        """Return the stored current finite value.
1430
1431        Returns:
1432            Current finite typed value.
1433        """
1434        return self._current_value
1435
1436    def get_default_value(self) -> TNum:
1437        """Return the stored default finite value.
1438
1439        Returns:
1440            Default typed value.
1441        """
1442        return self._default_value
1443
1444    def get_min_value(self) -> TNum:
1445        """Return the current minimum finite value.
1446
1447        Returns:
1448            Minimum typed value.
1449        """
1450        return self._min_value
1451
1452    def get_max_value(self) -> TNum:
1453        """Return the current maximum finite value.
1454
1455        Returns:
1456            Maximum typed value.
1457        """
1458        return self._max_value
1459
1460    def _validate_value(self, value: TNum) -> TNum:
1461        """Validate a numeric value against hard limits.
1462
1463        Args:
1464            value: Value to validate.
1465
1466        Returns:
1467            Normalized and validated typed value.
1468        """
1469        value = self.evaluate_value(value)
1470        if not self.value_in_limit(value):
1471            raise ValueError(self._range_err_msg("value"))
1472        return value
1473
1474    def _new_apply_value(self, value: TNum, keep_default_value: bool) -> None:
1475        """Apply a validated value and extend the visible range if needed.
1476
1477        Args:
1478            value: Validated value to apply.
1479            keep_default_value: Whether to preserve the current default value.
1480        """
1481        self._current_value = value
1482        if not keep_default_value:
1483            self._default_value = self._current_value
1484
1485        extended = False
1486        if value < self._min_value:
1487            self._min_value = value
1488            extended = True
1489        if value > self._max_value:
1490            self._max_value = value
1491            extended = True
1492
1493        self._update_mapping_anchors()
1494        self._apply_range_to_slider()
1495        self.blockSignals(True)
1496        try:
1497            self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._current_value))
1498        finally:
1499            self.blockSignals(False)
1500
1501        self._update_all_labels()
1502        self._update_value_width()
1503
1504        if extended:
1505            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())
1506
1507    def set_value(self, value: Any, keep_default_value: bool = False) -> None:
1508        """Set the current value, supporting special infinity markers.
1509
1510        Args:
1511            value: New value or special infinity marker.
1512            keep_default_value: Whether to leave the stored default unchanged.
1513        """
1514        sv = normalize_special_value(value)
1515        if sv is not None:
1516            self._enter_special_mode(sv)
1517            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
1518            return
1519        self._exit_special_mode()
1520
1521        validated = self._validate_value(value)
1522        self._new_apply_value(validated, keep_default_value)
1523
1524    def set_default_value(self, value: TNum) -> None:
1525        """Set the default finite value.
1526
1527        Args:
1528            value: New default value.
1529        """
1530        self._default_value = self._validate_value(value)
1531
1532        extended = False
1533        if value < self._min_value:
1534            self._min_value = value
1535            extended = True
1536        if value > self._max_value:
1537            self._max_value = value
1538            extended = True
1539
1540        self._update_mapping_anchors()
1541        self._apply_range_to_slider()
1542        self.blockSignals(True)
1543        try:
1544            self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._current_value))
1545        finally:
1546            self.blockSignals(False)
1547
1548        self._update_all_labels()
1549        self._update_value_width()
1550
1551        if extended:
1552            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())
1553
1554    def _validate_range(self, min_val: TNum, max_val: TNum) -> Tuple[TNum, TNum]:
1555        """Validate a numeric range.
1556
1557        Args:
1558            min_val: Proposed minimum value.
1559            max_val: Proposed maximum value.
1560
1561        Returns:
1562            Tuple of normalized minimum and maximum values.
1563        """
1564        min_val = self.evaluate_value(min_val)
1565        max_val = self.evaluate_value(max_val)
1566        if min_val >= max_val:
1567            raise ValueError(f"min_val ({min_val}) must be less than max_val ({max_val})")
1568
1569        if not self.value_in_limit(min_val):
1570            raise ValueError(self._range_err_msg("min_val"))
1571        if not self.value_in_limit(max_val):
1572            raise ValueError(self._range_err_msg("max_val"))
1573        return min_val, max_val
1574
1575    def set_range(self, min_val: TNum, max_val: TNum) -> None:
1576        """Set the numeric range and clamp current/default values as needed.
1577
1578        Args:
1579            min_val: New minimum value.
1580            max_val: New maximum value.
1581        """
1582        new_min_val, new_max_val = self._validate_range(min_val, max_val)
1583        self._min_value = new_min_val
1584        self._max_value = new_max_val
1585
1586        dft_clamped = False
1587        if self._current_value < new_min_val:
1588            self._current_value = new_min_val
1589        elif self._current_value > new_max_val:
1590            self._current_value = new_max_val
1591
1592        if self._default_value < new_min_val:
1593            self._default_value = new_min_val
1594            dft_clamped = True
1595        elif self._default_value > new_max_val:
1596            self._default_value = new_max_val
1597            dft_clamped = True
1598
1599        self._update_mapping_anchors()
1600        self._apply_range_to_slider()
1601        self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._current_value))
1602
1603        self._update_all_labels()
1604        self._update_value_width()
1605
1606        if dft_clamped:
1607            self.defaultChanged.emit(self._default_value)
1608
1609    def set_min_value(self, min_val: TNum) -> None:
1610        """Update only the minimum bound.
1611
1612        Args:
1613            min_val: New minimum value.
1614        """
1615        self.set_range(min_val, self._max_value)
1616
1617    def set_max_value(self, max_val: TNum) -> None:
1618        """Update only the maximum bound.
1619
1620        Args:
1621            max_val: New maximum value.
1622        """
1623        self.set_range(self._min_value, max_val)

Base class for editable numeric sliders.

NumericSliderBase( label: str, unit: str, value_is_int: bool, min_val: ~TNum, max_val: ~TNum, init_val: float | int | str, val_fmt: str, min_limit: Optional[~TNum], max_limit: Optional[~TNum], min_limit_inclusive: bool, max_limit_inclusive: bool, orientation: PySide6.QtCore.Qt.Orientation, editable: bool, show_range: bool, parent: Optional[PySide6.QtWidgets.QWidget]) 
1011    def __init__(
1012        self,
1013        label: str,
1014        unit: str,
1015        value_is_int: bool,
1016        min_val: TNum,
1017        max_val: TNum,
1018        init_val: float | int | str,
1019        val_fmt: str,
1020        min_limit: TNum | None,
1021        max_limit: TNum | None,
1022        min_limit_inclusive: bool,
1023        max_limit_inclusive: bool,
1024        orientation: Qt.Orientation,
1025        editable: bool,
1026        show_range: bool,
1027        parent: Optional[QWidget],
1028    ):
1029        """Initialize the numeric slider base class.
1030
1031        Args:
1032            label: Slider label text.
1033            unit: Optional unit label.
1034            value_is_int: Whether the slider uses integer values.
1035            min_val: Initial minimum value.
1036            max_val: Initial maximum value.
1037            init_val: Initial current value or a special infinity marker.
1038            val_fmt: Value display format string.
1039            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
1040            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
1041            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
1042            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
1043            orientation: Slider orientation.
1044            editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled.
1045            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
1046            parent: Optional parent widget.
1047        """
1048        init_special = normalize_special_value(init_val)
1049        if init_special is not None:
1050            init_val = max_val if init_special == "+inf" else min_val
1051
1052        super().__init__(
1053            label=label,
1054            unit=unit,
1055            min_val=min_val,
1056            max_val=max_val,
1057            init_val=init_val,
1058            orientation=orientation,
1059            val_fmt=val_fmt,
1060            show_range=show_range,
1061            parent=parent,
1062        )
1063
1064        self._min_limit = min_limit
1065        self._max_limit = max_limit
1066        self._min_limit_inclusive = min_limit_inclusive
1067        self._max_limit_inclusive = max_limit_inclusive
1068
1069        self._add_right_click_items()
1070        self._set_right_click_item_enabled("edit_config", editable)
1071        self.value_is_int = value_is_int
1072
1073        self._min_value, self._max_value = self._validate_range(min_val, max_val)
1074        init_val = self._validate_value(init_val)
1075
1076        if init_special is None:
1077            if not (min_val <= init_val <= max_val):
1078                raise ValueError(f"init_val ({init_val}) must be within [{min_val}, {max_val}]")
1079        else:
1080            if init_special == "+inf" and self._max_limit is not None:
1081                raise ValueError("init_val cannot be +inf when max_limit is set")
1082            if init_special == "-inf" and self._min_limit is not None:
1083                raise ValueError("init_val cannot be -inf when min_limit is set")
1084
1085        self._current_value = init_val
1086        self._default_value = init_val
1087        self._current_special_value: SpecialValue | None = init_special
1088
1089        self._v0, self._v1 = 0.0, 0.0
1090        self._p0, self._p1 = 0, 0
1091
1092        self._setup_slider()
1093        if init_special is not None:
1094            self._enter_special_mode(init_special)
1095        else:
1096            self.set_value(self._default_value)
1097
1098        self._slider.valueChanged.connect(self._on_slider_value_changed)
1099
1100        self._update_value_width()
1101        self._update_layout()
1102        self._update_value_label()

Initialize the numeric slider base class.

Args: label: Slider label text. unit: Optional unit label. value_is_int: Whether the slider uses integer values. min_val: Initial minimum value. max_val: Initial maximum value. init_val: Initial current value or a special infinity marker. val_fmt: Value display format string. min_limit: Optional lower hard limit. max_limit: Optional upper hard limit. min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive. max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive. orientation: Slider orientation. editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled. show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown. parent: Optional parent widget.

value_is_int
def value_in_limit(self, value: ~TNum) -> bool: 
1131    def value_in_limit(self, value: TNum) -> bool:
1132        """Return whether a value lies within the configured hard limits.
1133
1134        Args:
1135            value: Value to test.
1136
1137        Returns:
1138            ``True`` if the value is allowed, otherwise ``False``.
1139        """
1140        if self._min_limit is not None:
1141            if value < self._min_limit:
1142                return False
1143            elif value == self._min_limit:
1144                return self._min_limit_inclusive
1145
1146        if self._max_limit is not None:
1147            if value > self._max_limit:
1148                return False
1149            elif value == self._max_limit:
1150                return self._max_limit_inclusive
1151
1152        return True

Return whether a value lies within the configured hard limits.

Args: value: Value to test.

Returns: True if the value is allowed, otherwise False.

def save_current_value_as_default_value(self): 
1378    def save_current_value_as_default_value(self):
1379        """Store the current numeric value as the default value."""
1380        self._default_value = self._current_value
1381        self.blockSignals(True)
1382        try:
1383            self._reset_to_default_value()
1384        finally:
1385            self.blockSignals(False)
1386        self.defaultChanged.emit(self._default_value)

Store the current numeric value as the default value.

def get_config(self) -> dict: 
1392    def get_config(self) -> dict:
1393        """Return a serializable configuration snapshot.
1394
1395        Returns:
1396            Mapping containing the current range, format, and range-visibility
1397            state.
1398        """
1399        return {
1400            "min_val": self._min_value,
1401            "max_val": self._max_value,
1402            "val_fmt": self._val_fmt,
1403            "show_range": self._show_range,
1404        }

Return a serializable configuration snapshot.

Returns: Mapping containing the current range, format, and range-visibility state.

def get_value(self): 
1416    def get_value(self):
1417        """Return the current value, including special infinity states.
1418
1419        Returns:
1420            Current numeric value, ``math.inf``, or ``-math.inf``.
1421        """
1422        if self._current_special_value == "+inf":
1423            return math.inf
1424        if self._current_special_value == "-inf":
1425            return -math.inf
1426        return self._current_value

Return the current value, including special infinity states.

Returns: Current numeric value, math.inf, or -math.inf.

def get_current_value(self) -> ~TNum: 
1428    def get_current_value(self) -> TNum:
1429        """Return the stored current finite value.
1430
1431        Returns:
1432            Current finite typed value.
1433        """
1434        return self._current_value

Return the stored current finite value.

Returns: Current finite typed value.

def get_default_value(self) -> ~TNum: 
1436    def get_default_value(self) -> TNum:
1437        """Return the stored default finite value.
1438
1439        Returns:
1440            Default typed value.
1441        """
1442        return self._default_value

Return the stored default finite value.

Returns: Default typed value.

def get_min_value(self) -> ~TNum: 
1444    def get_min_value(self) -> TNum:
1445        """Return the current minimum finite value.
1446
1447        Returns:
1448            Minimum typed value.
1449        """
1450        return self._min_value

Return the current minimum finite value.

Returns: Minimum typed value.

def get_max_value(self) -> ~TNum: 
1452    def get_max_value(self) -> TNum:
1453        """Return the current maximum finite value.
1454
1455        Returns:
1456            Maximum typed value.
1457        """
1458        return self._max_value

Return the current maximum finite value.

Returns: Maximum typed value.

def set_value(self, value: Any, keep_default_value: bool = False) -> None: 
1507    def set_value(self, value: Any, keep_default_value: bool = False) -> None:
1508        """Set the current value, supporting special infinity markers.
1509
1510        Args:
1511            value: New value or special infinity marker.
1512            keep_default_value: Whether to leave the stored default unchanged.
1513        """
1514        sv = normalize_special_value(value)
1515        if sv is not None:
1516            self._enter_special_mode(sv)
1517            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
1518            return
1519        self._exit_special_mode()
1520
1521        validated = self._validate_value(value)
1522        self._new_apply_value(validated, keep_default_value)

Set the current value, supporting special infinity markers.

Args: value: New value or special infinity marker. keep_default_value: Whether to leave the stored default unchanged.

def set_default_value(self, value: ~TNum) -> None: 
1524    def set_default_value(self, value: TNum) -> None:
1525        """Set the default finite value.
1526
1527        Args:
1528            value: New default value.
1529        """
1530        self._default_value = self._validate_value(value)
1531
1532        extended = False
1533        if value < self._min_value:
1534            self._min_value = value
1535            extended = True
1536        if value > self._max_value:
1537            self._max_value = value
1538            extended = True
1539
1540        self._update_mapping_anchors()
1541        self._apply_range_to_slider()
1542        self.blockSignals(True)
1543        try:
1544            self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._current_value))
1545        finally:
1546            self.blockSignals(False)
1547
1548        self._update_all_labels()
1549        self._update_value_width()
1550
1551        if extended:
1552            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())

Set the default finite value.

Args: value: New default value.

def set_range(self, min_val: ~TNum, max_val: ~TNum) -> None: 
1575    def set_range(self, min_val: TNum, max_val: TNum) -> None:
1576        """Set the numeric range and clamp current/default values as needed.
1577
1578        Args:
1579            min_val: New minimum value.
1580            max_val: New maximum value.
1581        """
1582        new_min_val, new_max_val = self._validate_range(min_val, max_val)
1583        self._min_value = new_min_val
1584        self._max_value = new_max_val
1585
1586        dft_clamped = False
1587        if self._current_value < new_min_val:
1588            self._current_value = new_min_val
1589        elif self._current_value > new_max_val:
1590            self._current_value = new_max_val
1591
1592        if self._default_value < new_min_val:
1593            self._default_value = new_min_val
1594            dft_clamped = True
1595        elif self._default_value > new_max_val:
1596            self._default_value = new_max_val
1597            dft_clamped = True
1598
1599        self._update_mapping_anchors()
1600        self._apply_range_to_slider()
1601        self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._current_value))
1602
1603        self._update_all_labels()
1604        self._update_value_width()
1605
1606        if dft_clamped:
1607            self.defaultChanged.emit(self._default_value)

Set the numeric range and clamp current/default values as needed.

Args: min_val: New minimum value. max_val: New maximum value.

def set_min_value(self, min_val: ~TNum) -> None: 
1609    def set_min_value(self, min_val: TNum) -> None:
1610        """Update only the minimum bound.
1611
1612        Args:
1613            min_val: New minimum value.
1614        """
1615        self.set_range(min_val, self._max_value)

Update only the minimum bound.

Args: min_val: New minimum value.

def set_max_value(self, max_val: ~TNum) -> None: 
1617    def set_max_value(self, max_val: TNum) -> None:
1618        """Update only the maximum bound.
1619
1620        Args:
1621            max_val: New maximum value.
1622        """
1623        self.set_range(self._min_value, max_val)

Update only the maximum bound.

Args: max_val: New maximum value.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("NumericSliderBase" inherits "LabeledSliderBase": )

class IntSlider(ui.params.sliders.NumericSliderBase[int]): 
1626class IntSlider(NumericSliderBase[int]):
1627    """Integer-valued slider whose QSlider range matches the numeric range directly."""
1628
1629    def __init__(
1630        self,
1631        label: str,
1632        min_val: int,
1633        max_val: int,
1634        unit: str = "",
1635        init_val: Optional[int] = None,
1636        val_fmt: str = "{:d}",
1637        min_limit: int | None = None,
1638        max_limit: int | None = None,
1639        min_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1640        max_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1641        show_range: bool = True,
1642        orientation: Qt.Orientation = Qt.Horizontal,
1643        editable: bool = True,
1644        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
1645    ):
1646        """Initialize the integer slider.
1647
1648        Args:
1649            label: Slider label text.
1650            min_val: Minimum numeric value.
1651            max_val: Maximum numeric value.
1652            unit: Optional unit label.
1653            init_val: Initial value. Defaults to the midpoint of the range.
1654            val_fmt: Integer display format string.
1655            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
1656            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
1657            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
1658            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
1659            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
1660            orientation: Slider orientation.
1661            editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled.
1662            parent: Optional parent widget.
1663        """
1664        if init_val is None:
1665            init_val = (min_val + max_val) // 2
1666
1667        super().__init__(
1668            label=label,
1669            unit=unit,
1670            value_is_int=True,
1671            min_val=min_val,
1672            max_val=max_val,
1673            init_val=init_val,
1674            val_fmt=val_fmt,
1675            min_limit=min_limit,
1676            max_limit=max_limit,
1677            min_limit_inclusive=min_limit_inclusive,
1678            max_limit_inclusive=max_limit_inclusive,
1679            orientation=orientation,
1680            show_range=show_range,
1681            editable=editable,
1682            parent=parent,
1683        )
1684
1685    def _setup_slider(self) -> None:
1686        """Configure the integer slider range and initial position."""
1687        self._slider.setRange(self._min_value, self._max_value)
1688        self._slider.setValue(self._default_value)
1689
1690    def evaluate_value(self, value: int) -> int:
1691        """Normalize an integer value using the evaluation format.
1692
1693        Args:
1694            value: Integer value to normalize.
1695
1696        Returns:
1697            Normalized integer value.
1698        """
1699        try:
1700            return int(self._eval_fmt.format(value))
1701        except Exception:
1702            return int(value)
1703
1704    def _apply_range_to_slider(self) -> None:
1705        """Apply numeric bounds directly to the underlying QSlider."""
1706        self._slider.setRange(int(self._min_value), int(self._max_value))
1707
1708    def _pos_to_value(self, pos: int) -> int:
1709        """Convert an integer slider position to a typed value.
1710
1711        Args:
1712            pos: Slider position.
1713
1714        Returns:
1715            Same integer value.
1716        """
1717        return pos
1718
1719    def _value_to_pos(self, value: int) -> int:
1720        """Convert an integer value to a slider position.
1721
1722        Args:
1723            value: Integer value.
1724
1725        Returns:
1726            Same integer position.
1727        """
1728        return value
1729
1730    def _validate_value(self, value: int) -> int:
1731        """Validate that the supplied value is an integer.
1732
1733        Args:
1734            value: Value to validate.
1735
1736        Returns:
1737            Validated integer value.
1738        """
1739        if not isinstance(value, int):
1740            raise TypeError(f"value must be int, not {type(value).__name__}")
1741        return super()._validate_value(value)

Integer-valued slider whose QSlider range matches the numeric range directly.

IntSlider( label: str, min_val: int, max_val: int, unit: str = '', init_val: Optional[int] = None, val_fmt: str = '{:d}', min_limit: int | None = None, max_limit: int | None = None, min_limit_inclusive: bool = True, max_limit_inclusive: bool = True, show_range: bool = True, orientation: PySide6.QtCore.Qt.Orientation = <Orientation.Horizontal: 1>, editable: bool = True, parent: Optional[PySide6.QtWidgets.QWidget] = None) 
1629    def __init__(
1630        self,
1631        label: str,
1632        min_val: int,
1633        max_val: int,
1634        unit: str = "",
1635        init_val: Optional[int] = None,
1636        val_fmt: str = "{:d}",
1637        min_limit: int | None = None,
1638        max_limit: int | None = None,
1639        min_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1640        max_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1641        show_range: bool = True,
1642        orientation: Qt.Orientation = Qt.Horizontal,
1643        editable: bool = True,
1644        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
1645    ):
1646        """Initialize the integer slider.
1647
1648        Args:
1649            label: Slider label text.
1650            min_val: Minimum numeric value.
1651            max_val: Maximum numeric value.
1652            unit: Optional unit label.
1653            init_val: Initial value. Defaults to the midpoint of the range.
1654            val_fmt: Integer display format string.
1655            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
1656            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
1657            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
1658            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
1659            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
1660            orientation: Slider orientation.
1661            editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled.
1662            parent: Optional parent widget.
1663        """
1664        if init_val is None:
1665            init_val = (min_val + max_val) // 2
1666
1667        super().__init__(
1668            label=label,
1669            unit=unit,
1670            value_is_int=True,
1671            min_val=min_val,
1672            max_val=max_val,
1673            init_val=init_val,
1674            val_fmt=val_fmt,
1675            min_limit=min_limit,
1676            max_limit=max_limit,
1677            min_limit_inclusive=min_limit_inclusive,
1678            max_limit_inclusive=max_limit_inclusive,
1679            orientation=orientation,
1680            show_range=show_range,
1681            editable=editable,
1682            parent=parent,
1683        )

Initialize the integer slider.

Args: label: Slider label text. min_val: Minimum numeric value. max_val: Maximum numeric value. unit: Optional unit label. init_val: Initial value. Defaults to the midpoint of the range. val_fmt: Integer display format string. min_limit: Optional lower hard limit. max_limit: Optional upper hard limit. min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive. max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive. show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown. orientation: Slider orientation. editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled. parent: Optional parent widget.

def evaluate_value(self, value: int) -> int: 
1690    def evaluate_value(self, value: int) -> int:
1691        """Normalize an integer value using the evaluation format.
1692
1693        Args:
1694            value: Integer value to normalize.
1695
1696        Returns:
1697            Normalized integer value.
1698        """
1699        try:
1700            return int(self._eval_fmt.format(value))
1701        except Exception:
1702            return int(value)

Returns: Normalized integer value.

class FloatSlider(ui.params.sliders.NumericSliderBase[float]): 
1744class FloatSlider(NumericSliderBase[float]):
1745    """Float-valued slider backed by an integer QSlider with piecewise mapping."""
1746
1747    def __init__(
1748        self,
1749        label: str,
1750        min_val: float,
1751        max_val: float,
1752        unit: str = "",
1753        init_val: Optional[float | str] = None,
1754        val_fmt: str = "{:.3f}",
1755        min_limit: float | None = None,
1756        max_limit: float | None = None,
1757        min_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1758        max_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1759        steps: int = 1_000_000,
1760        show_range: bool = True,
1761        orientation: Qt.Orientation = Qt.Horizontal,
1762        editable: bool = True,
1763        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
1764    ):
1765        """Initialize the float slider.
1766
1767        Args:
1768            label: Slider label text.
1769            min_val: Minimum numeric value.
1770            max_val: Maximum numeric value.
1771            unit: Optional unit label.
1772            init_val: Initial value or special infinity marker.
1773            val_fmt: Float display format string.
1774            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
1775            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
1776            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
1777            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
1778            steps: Integer slider resolution.
1779            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
1780            orientation: Slider orientation.
1781            editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled.
1782            parent: Optional parent widget.
1783        """
1784        if steps <= 0:
1785            raise ValueError("steps must be a positive integer")
1786        self._steps = steps
1787
1788        if init_val is None:
1789            init_val = 0.5 * (min_val + max_val)
1790
1791        super().__init__(
1792            label=label,
1793            unit=unit,
1794            value_is_int=False,
1795            min_val=min_val,
1796            max_val=max_val,
1797            init_val=init_val,
1798            val_fmt=val_fmt,
1799            min_limit=min_limit,
1800            max_limit=max_limit,
1801            min_limit_inclusive=min_limit_inclusive,
1802            max_limit_inclusive=max_limit_inclusive,
1803            show_range=show_range,
1804            orientation=orientation,
1805            editable=editable,
1806            parent=parent,
1807        )
1808
1809    def _setup_slider(self) -> None:
1810        """Configure the integer-backed slider range and initial position."""
1811        self._slider.setRange(0, self._steps)
1812        self._slider.setValue(self._value_to_pos(self._default_value))
1813
1814    def evaluate_value(self, value: float) -> float:
1815        """Normalize a float value using the evaluation format.
1816
1817        Args:
1818            value: Float value to normalize.
1819
1820        Returns:
1821            Normalized float value.
1822        """
1823        try:
1824            return float(self._eval_fmt.format(value))
1825        except Exception:
1826            return float(value)
1827
1828    def _pos_to_value(self, pos: int) -> float:
1829        """Convert a slider position to a float via piecewise linear interpolation.
1830
1831        Args:
1832            pos: Integer slider position.
1833
1834        Returns:
1835            Interpolated float value.
1836        """
1837        v_min, v0, v1, v_max = self._min_value, self._v0, self._v1, self._max_value
1838        p_min, p0, p1, p_max = self._slider.minimum(), self._p0, self._p1, self._slider.maximum()
1839
1840        if pos <= p_min:
1841            return v_min
1842        if pos < p0:
1843            return _map_pos_to_val(pos, p_min, p0, v_min, v0)
1844        if pos == p0:
1845            return v0
1846        if pos < p1:
1847            return _map_pos_to_val(pos, p0, p1, v0, v1)
1848        if pos == p1:
1849            return v1
1850        if pos < p_max:
1851            return _map_pos_to_val(pos, p1, p_max, v1, v_max)
1852        return v_max
1853
1854    def _value_to_pos(self, value: float) -> int:
1855        """Convert a float value to a slider position via piecewise interpolation.
1856
1857        Args:
1858            value: Float value to convert.
1859
1860        Returns:
1861            Integer slider position.
1862        """
1863        v_min, v0, v1, v_max = self._min_value, self._v0, self._v1, self._max_value
1864        p_min, p0, p1, p_max = self._slider.minimum(), self._p0, self._p1, self._slider.maximum()
1865
1866        if value <= v_min:
1867            return p_min
1868        if value < v0:
1869            return _map_val_to_pos(value, v_min, v0, p_min, p0)
1870        if value == v0:
1871            return p0
1872        if value < v1:
1873            return _map_val_to_pos(value, v0, v1, p0, p1)
1874        if value == v1:
1875            return p1
1876        if value < v_max:
1877            return _map_val_to_pos(value, v1, v_max, p1, p_max)
1878        return p_max
1879
1880    def _update_mapping_anchors(self) -> None:
1881        """Update mapping anchors based on the current and default values."""
1882        val1, val2 = self._current_value, self._default_value
1883        v_min, v_max = self._min_value, self._max_value
1884        p_min, p_max = self._slider.minimum(), self._slider.maximum()
1885        v0, v1 = (val1, val2) if val1 <= val2 else (val2, val1)
1886
1887        if p_max - p_min < 3:
1888            self._p0, self._p1 = p_min, p_max
1889            self._v0, self._v1 = v0, v1
1890            return
1891
1892        lo, hi = p_min + 1, p_max - 1
1893
1894        p0 = _map_val_to_pos(v0, v_min, v_max, p_min, p_max)
1895        p1 = _map_val_to_pos(v1, v_min, v_max, p_min, p_max)
1896
1897        if v0 > v_min:
1898            p0 = max(p0, lo)
1899        if v0 < v_max:
1900            p0 = min(p0, hi)
1901
1902        if v1 > v_min:
1903            p1 = max(p1, lo)
1904        if v1 < v_max:
1905            p1 = min(p1, hi)
1906
1907        if v1 > v0 and p1 == p0:
1908            if p0 < hi:
1909                p1 = p0 + 1
1910            else:
1911                p0 = p1 - 1
1912
1913        self._p0, self._p1 = p0, p1
1914        self._v0, self._v1 = v0, v1
1915
1916    def _validate_value(self, value: float) -> float:
1917        """Validate that the supplied value is numeric.
1918
1919        Args:
1920            value: Value to validate.
1921
1922        Returns:
1923            Validated float value.
1924        """
1925        if not isinstance(value, float | int):
1926            raise TypeError(f"value must be float, not {type(value).__name__}")
1927        return super()._validate_value(value)

Float-valued slider backed by an integer QSlider with piecewise mapping.

FloatSlider( label: str, min_val: float, max_val: float, unit: str = '', init_val: Union[float, str, NoneType] = None, val_fmt: str = '{:.3f}', min_limit: float | None = None, max_limit: float | None = None, min_limit_inclusive: bool = True, max_limit_inclusive: bool = True, steps: int = 1000000, show_range: bool = True, orientation: PySide6.QtCore.Qt.Orientation = <Orientation.Horizontal: 1>, editable: bool = True, parent: Optional[PySide6.QtWidgets.QWidget] = None) 
1747    def __init__(
1748        self,
1749        label: str,
1750        min_val: float,
1751        max_val: float,
1752        unit: str = "",
1753        init_val: Optional[float | str] = None,
1754        val_fmt: str = "{:.3f}",
1755        min_limit: float | None = None,
1756        max_limit: float | None = None,
1757        min_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1758        max_limit_inclusive: bool = True,
1759        steps: int = 1_000_000,
1760        show_range: bool = True,
1761        orientation: Qt.Orientation = Qt.Horizontal,
1762        editable: bool = True,
1763        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
1764    ):
1765        """Initialize the float slider.
1766
1767        Args:
1768            label: Slider label text.
1769            min_val: Minimum numeric value.
1770            max_val: Maximum numeric value.
1771            unit: Optional unit label.
1772            init_val: Initial value or special infinity marker.
1773            val_fmt: Float display format string.
1774            min_limit: Optional lower hard limit.
1775            max_limit: Optional upper hard limit.
1776            min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive.
1777            max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive.
1778            steps: Integer slider resolution.
1779            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
1780            orientation: Slider orientation.
1781            editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled.
1782            parent: Optional parent widget.
1783        """
1784        if steps <= 0:
1785            raise ValueError("steps must be a positive integer")
1786        self._steps = steps
1787
1788        if init_val is None:
1789            init_val = 0.5 * (min_val + max_val)
1790
1791        super().__init__(
1792            label=label,
1793            unit=unit,
1794            value_is_int=False,
1795            min_val=min_val,
1796            max_val=max_val,
1797            init_val=init_val,
1798            val_fmt=val_fmt,
1799            min_limit=min_limit,
1800            max_limit=max_limit,
1801            min_limit_inclusive=min_limit_inclusive,
1802            max_limit_inclusive=max_limit_inclusive,
1803            show_range=show_range,
1804            orientation=orientation,
1805            editable=editable,
1806            parent=parent,
1807        )

Initialize the float slider.

Args: label: Slider label text. min_val: Minimum numeric value. max_val: Maximum numeric value. unit: Optional unit label. init_val: Initial value or special infinity marker. val_fmt: Float display format string. min_limit: Optional lower hard limit. max_limit: Optional upper hard limit. min_limit_inclusive: Whether the lower hard limit is inclusive. max_limit_inclusive: Whether the upper hard limit is inclusive. steps: Integer slider resolution. show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown. orientation: Slider orientation. editable: Whether editing actions should be enabled. parent: Optional parent widget.

def evaluate_value(self, value: float) -> float: 
1814    def evaluate_value(self, value: float) -> float:
1815        """Normalize a float value using the evaluation format.
1816
1817        Args:
1818            value: Float value to normalize.
1819
1820        Returns:
1821            Normalized float value.
1822        """
1823        try:
1824            return float(self._eval_fmt.format(value))
1825        except Exception:
1826            return float(value)

Normalize a float value using the evaluation format.

Args: value: Float value to normalize.

Returns: Normalized float value.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("FloatSlider" inherits "NumericSliderBase": )

class ArrEditConfigDialog(PySide6.QtWidgets.QDialog): 
1930class ArrEditConfigDialog(QDialog):
1931    """Dialog for editing array-slider length, format, and range visibility."""
1932
1933    def __init__(
1934        self,
1935        slider_name: str,
1936        arr_length: int,
1937        val_fmt: str,
1938        show_range: bool = True,
1939        show_range_enabled: bool = True,
1940        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
1941    ):
1942        """Initialize the array-slider configuration dialog.
1943
1944        Args:
1945            slider_name: Display name of the slider.
1946            arr_length: Current array length.
1947            val_fmt: Current display format string.
1948            show_range: Initial state of the range-label checkbox.
1949            show_range_enabled: Whether the range-label checkbox is editable.
1950            parent: Optional parent widget.
1951        """
1952        super().__init__(parent)
1953        self.setWindowTitle("Configuration")
1954
1955        self._show_range = show_range
1956        self._show_range_enabled = show_range_enabled
1957        sb = QSpinBox(self)
1958        sb.setMinimum(2)
1959        sb.setMaximum(100)
1960        sb.setValue(arr_length)
1961        sb.ensurePolished()
1962        sb.setFixedSize(sb.sizeHint())
1963        self._arr_length_sb = sb
1964        self._edit_fmt = QLineEdit(val_fmt, self)
1965        self._cb_ticks = QCheckBox("Show Range", self)
1966        self._cb_ticks.setChecked(show_range)
1967        self._cb_ticks.setEnabled(show_range_enabled)
1968
1969        buttons = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel, parent=self)
1970        buttons.accepted.connect(self.accept)
1971        buttons.rejected.connect(self.reject)
1972
1973        form = QFormLayout(self)
1974        form.setFormAlignment(Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter)
1975        form.addRow("Array Slider:", SvgLabel(slider_name, alignment=Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter))
1976        form.addRow(self._cb_ticks)
1977        form.addRow("Array Length:", self._arr_length_sb)
1978        form.addRow("Format:", self._edit_fmt)
1979        form.addRow(buttons)
1980
1981        self.setSizeGripEnabled(False)
1982        self.adjustSize()
1983        self.setFixedSize(self.size())
1984
1985    def get_values(self) -> Tuple[int, str, bool]:
1986        """Return the validated dialog values.
1987
1988        Returns:
1989            Tuple containing array length, format string, and range-visibility flag.
1990        """
1991        return (
1992            self._arr_length_sb.value(),
1993            self._edit_fmt.text(),
1994            self._cb_ticks.isChecked(),
1995        )
1996
1997    def showEvent(self, event: QShowEvent) -> None:
1998        """Focus the array-length control when the dialog is shown.
1999
2000        Args:
2001            event: Qt show event.
2002        """
2003        super().showEvent(event)
2004        self._arr_length_sb.setFocus()
2005        self._arr_length_sb.selectAll()

Dialog for editing array-slider length, format, and range visibility.

ArrEditConfigDialog( slider_name: str, arr_length: int, val_fmt: str, show_range: bool = True, show_range_enabled: bool = True, parent: Optional[PySide6.QtWidgets.QWidget] = None) 
1933    def __init__(
1934        self,
1935        slider_name: str,
1936        arr_length: int,
1937        val_fmt: str,
1938        show_range: bool = True,
1939        show_range_enabled: bool = True,
1940        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
1941    ):
1942        """Initialize the array-slider configuration dialog.
1943
1944        Args:
1945            slider_name: Display name of the slider.
1946            arr_length: Current array length.
1947            val_fmt: Current display format string.
1948            show_range: Initial state of the range-label checkbox.
1949            show_range_enabled: Whether the range-label checkbox is editable.
1950            parent: Optional parent widget.
1951        """
1952        super().__init__(parent)
1953        self.setWindowTitle("Configuration")
1954
1955        self._show_range = show_range
1956        self._show_range_enabled = show_range_enabled
1957        sb = QSpinBox(self)
1958        sb.setMinimum(2)
1959        sb.setMaximum(100)
1960        sb.setValue(arr_length)
1961        sb.ensurePolished()
1962        sb.setFixedSize(sb.sizeHint())
1963        self._arr_length_sb = sb
1964        self._edit_fmt = QLineEdit(val_fmt, self)
1965        self._cb_ticks = QCheckBox("Show Range", self)
1966        self._cb_ticks.setChecked(show_range)
1967        self._cb_ticks.setEnabled(show_range_enabled)
1968
1969        buttons = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel, parent=self)
1970        buttons.accepted.connect(self.accept)
1971        buttons.rejected.connect(self.reject)
1972
1973        form = QFormLayout(self)
1974        form.setFormAlignment(Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter)
1975        form.addRow("Array Slider:", SvgLabel(slider_name, alignment=Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter))
1976        form.addRow(self._cb_ticks)
1977        form.addRow("Array Length:", self._arr_length_sb)
1978        form.addRow("Format:", self._edit_fmt)
1979        form.addRow(buttons)
1980
1981        self.setSizeGripEnabled(False)
1982        self.adjustSize()
1983        self.setFixedSize(self.size())

Initialize the array-slider configuration dialog.

Args: slider_name: Display name of the slider. arr_length: Current array length. val_fmt: Current display format string. show_range: Initial state of the range-label checkbox. show_range_enabled: Whether the range-label checkbox is editable. parent: Optional parent widget.

def get_values(self) -> Tuple[int, str, bool]: 
1985    def get_values(self) -> Tuple[int, str, bool]:
1986        """Return the validated dialog values.
1987
1988        Returns:
1989            Tuple containing array length, format string, and range-visibility flag.
1990        """
1991        return (
1992            self._arr_length_sb.value(),
1993            self._edit_fmt.text(),
1994            self._cb_ticks.isChecked(),
1995        )

Return the validated dialog values.

Returns: Tuple containing array length, format string, and range-visibility flag.

def showEvent(self, event: PySide6.QtGui.QShowEvent) -> None: 
1997    def showEvent(self, event: QShowEvent) -> None:
1998        """Focus the array-length control when the dialog is shown.
1999
2000        Args:
2001            event: Qt show event.
2002        """
2003        super().showEvent(event)
2004        self._arr_length_sb.setFocus()
2005        self._arr_length_sb.selectAll()

Focus the array-length control when the dialog is shown.

Args: event: Qt show event.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("ArrEditConfigDialog" inherits "QDialog": )
class ArraySlider(ui.params.sliders.LabeledSliderBase[float]): 
2008class ArraySlider(LabeledSliderBase[float]):
2009    """Slider that selects an index from a stored numeric array."""
2010
2011    def __init__(
2012        self,
2013        label: str,
2014        arr_length: int,
2015        unit: str = "",
2016        min_val: float = 0.0,
2017        max_val: float = 1.0,
2018        init_index: int = 0,
2019        orientation: Qt.Orientation = Qt.Horizontal,
2020        val_fmt: str = "{:.2f}",
2021        show_range: bool = True,
2022        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
2023    ) -> None:
2024        """Initialize the array slider.
2025
2026        Args:
2027            label: Slider label text.
2028            arr_length: Number of array elements.
2029            unit: Optional unit label.
2030            min_val: Minimum array value.
2031            max_val: Maximum array value.
2032            init_index: Initial selected index.
2033            orientation: Slider orientation.
2034            val_fmt: Value display format string.
2035            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
2036            parent: Optional parent widget.
2037        """
2038        if arr_length < 2:
2039            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: array_length must be greater than 1.")
2040        if max_val < min_val:
2041            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: max_val must be >= min_val.")
2042
2043        self._arr = np.linspace(min_val, max_val, arr_length, dtype=float)
2044        self._arr_length = arr_length
2045        self._default_index = init_index % arr_length
2046
2047        self._current_value = self._arr[self._default_index]
2048        self._min_value = float(self._arr[0])
2049        self._max_value = float(self._arr[-1])
2050
2051        super().__init__(
2052            label=label,
2053            unit=unit,
2054            min_val=self._min_value,
2055            max_val=self._max_value,
2056            init_val=self._current_value,
2057            orientation=orientation,
2058            val_fmt=val_fmt,
2059            show_range=show_range,
2060            parent=parent,
2061        )
2062
2063        self._right_click_items.extend(
2064            [
2065                {"id": "sep"},
2066                {"id": "edit_config", "text": "Edit Configuration...", "enabled": True},
2067            ]
2068        )
2069
2070        self._slider.setRange(0, len(self._arr) - 1)
2071        self._slider.setValue(self._default_index)
2072        self.set_format(val_fmt)
2073
2074        self._slider.valueChanged.connect(self._on_slider_value_changed)
2075
2076        self._update_all_labels()
2077        self._update_value_width()
2078        self._update_layout()
2079
2080    def evaluate_value(self, value: float) -> float:
2081        """Normalize an array value using the evaluation format.
2082
2083        Args:
2084            value: Value to normalize.
2085
2086        Returns:
2087            Normalized float value.
2088        """
2089        try:
2090            return float(self._eval_fmt.format(value))
2091        except Exception:
2092            return value
2093
2094    def _pos_to_value(self, pos: int) -> float:
2095        """Return the array value at a slider position.
2096
2097        Args:
2098            pos: Slider index.
2099
2100        Returns:
2101            Array value at that index.
2102        """
2103        return float(self._arr[pos])
2104
2105    def _get_default_pos(self) -> int:
2106        """Return the default slider index.
2107
2108        Returns:
2109            Default array index.
2110        """
2111        return self._default_index
2112
2113    def _rebuild_arr(self, idx: int = -1) -> None:
2114        """Rebuild the numeric array and select an index.
2115
2116        Args:
2117            idx: Index to select after rebuilding.
2118        """
2119        self._default_index = idx % self._arr_length
2120        self._arr = np.linspace(self._min_value, self._max_value, self._arr_length, dtype=float)
2121        self._current_value = self._arr[self._default_index]
2122        self._slider.setRange(0, len(self._arr) - 1)
2123        self._slider.setValue(self._default_index)
2124
2125    def _right_click_requested(self, item_id, checked: bool) -> None:
2126        """Dispatch array-slider context-menu actions.
2127
2128        Args:
2129            item_id: Triggered menu item identifier.
2130            checked: Checked state associated with the action.
2131        """
2132        super()._right_click_requested(item_id, checked)
2133        if item_id == "edit_config":
2134            self._open_edit_config_dlg()
2135
2136    def save_current_value_as_default_value(self) -> None:
2137        """Store the current slider index as the default index."""
2138        self._default_index = self._slider.value()
2139
2140    def _reset_to_default_value(self) -> None:
2141        """Reset the slider to the stored default index."""
2142        self._slider.setValue(self._default_index)
2143
2144    def _open_edit_config_dlg(self) -> None:
2145        """Open the array configuration dialog and apply accepted changes."""
2146        dlg = ArrEditConfigDialog(
2147            slider_name=self._label_text,
2148            arr_length=self._arr_length,
2149            val_fmt=self._val_fmt,
2150            show_range=self._show_range,
2151            parent=self,
2152        )
2153        if dlg.exec() != QDialog.Accepted:
2154            return
2155        new_arr_length, new_fmt, new_show_range = dlg.get_values()
2156
2157        old_fmt = self._val_fmt
2158        old_show_range = self._show_range
2159
2160        self.set_format(new_fmt)
2161        self._show_range = new_show_range
2162
2163        if new_arr_length != self._arr_length:
2164            self._arr_length = new_arr_length
2165            self._rebuild_arr()
2166            self.valueChanged.emit(self.get_value())
2167
2168        self._update_all_labels()
2169        self._update_value_width()
2170        self._update_layout()
2171
2172        if old_fmt != self._val_fmt or old_show_range != self._show_range:
2173            self.configChanged.emit(self.get_config())
2174
2175    def get_config(self) -> dict:
2176        """Return a serializable configuration snapshot.
2177
2178        Returns:
2179            Mapping containing the current range, format, and range-visibility
2180            state.
2181        """
2182        return {
2183            "min_val": self._min_value,
2184            "max_val": self._max_value,
2185            "val_fmt": self._val_fmt,
2186            "show_range": self._show_range,
2187        }
2188
2189    def _apply_config(self, config: dict) -> None:
2190        """Apply a validated configuration mapping.
2191
2192        Args:
2193            config: Configuration mapping to apply.
2194        """
2195        self._show_range = config["show_range"]
2196        self.set_format(config["val_fmt"])
2197        self.set_range(config["min_val"], config["max_val"])
2198
2199    def _apply_value(self, value: float) -> None:
2200        """Apply a validated value to the widget state.
2201
2202        Args:
2203            value: Validated value to apply.
2204
2205        Note:
2206            The array slider primarily uses index-based updates through
2207            ``set_value`` and slider movement.
2208        """
2209        _ = value
2210
2211    def get_value(self):
2212        """Return the current array-slider state.
2213
2214        Returns:
2215            Mapping containing the array length and current selected index.
2216        """
2217        return {
2218            "arr_length": len(self._arr),
2219            "index": self._slider.value(),
2220        }
2221
2222    def set_value(self, value: Dict[str, int]) -> None:
2223        """Set the array-slider state from a mapping.
2224
2225        Args:
2226            value: Mapping containing ``arr_length`` and ``index`` entries.
2227        """
2228        arr_length = value.get("arr_length", self._arr_length)
2229        if arr_length < 2:
2230            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: arr_length must be greater than 1.")
2231        index = value.get("index", self._default_index) % arr_length
2232
2233        self._arr_length = arr_length
2234        self._rebuild_arr(index)
2235        self._update_all_labels()
2236        self._update_value_width()
2237
2238    def set_range(self, min_val: TNum, max_val: TNum) -> None:
2239        """Update the numeric range used to generate the backing array.
2240
2241        Args:
2242            min_val: New minimum array value.
2243            max_val: New maximum array value.
2244        """
2245        if max_val < min_val:
2246            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: max_val must be >= min_val.")
2247
2248        self._min_value = min_val
2249        self._max_value = max_val
2250        self._rebuild_arr()
2251        self._update_all_labels()
2252        self._update_value_width()

Slider that selects an index from a stored numeric array.

ArraySlider( label: str, arr_length: int, unit: str = '', min_val: float = 0.0, max_val: float = 1.0, init_index: int = 0, orientation: PySide6.QtCore.Qt.Orientation = <Orientation.Horizontal: 1>, val_fmt: str = '{:.2f}', show_range: bool = True, parent: Optional[PySide6.QtWidgets.QWidget] = None) 
2011    def __init__(
2012        self,
2013        label: str,
2014        arr_length: int,
2015        unit: str = "",
2016        min_val: float = 0.0,
2017        max_val: float = 1.0,
2018        init_index: int = 0,
2019        orientation: Qt.Orientation = Qt.Horizontal,
2020        val_fmt: str = "{:.2f}",
2021        show_range: bool = True,
2022        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
2023    ) -> None:
2024        """Initialize the array slider.
2025
2026        Args:
2027            label: Slider label text.
2028            arr_length: Number of array elements.
2029            unit: Optional unit label.
2030            min_val: Minimum array value.
2031            max_val: Maximum array value.
2032            init_index: Initial selected index.
2033            orientation: Slider orientation.
2034            val_fmt: Value display format string.
2035            show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown.
2036            parent: Optional parent widget.
2037        """
2038        if arr_length < 2:
2039            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: array_length must be greater than 1.")
2040        if max_val < min_val:
2041            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: max_val must be >= min_val.")
2042
2043        self._arr = np.linspace(min_val, max_val, arr_length, dtype=float)
2044        self._arr_length = arr_length
2045        self._default_index = init_index % arr_length
2046
2047        self._current_value = self._arr[self._default_index]
2048        self._min_value = float(self._arr[0])
2049        self._max_value = float(self._arr[-1])
2050
2051        super().__init__(
2052            label=label,
2053            unit=unit,
2054            min_val=self._min_value,
2055            max_val=self._max_value,
2056            init_val=self._current_value,
2057            orientation=orientation,
2058            val_fmt=val_fmt,
2059            show_range=show_range,
2060            parent=parent,
2061        )
2062
2063        self._right_click_items.extend(
2064            [
2065                {"id": "sep"},
2066                {"id": "edit_config", "text": "Edit Configuration...", "enabled": True},
2067            ]
2068        )
2069
2070        self._slider.setRange(0, len(self._arr) - 1)
2071        self._slider.setValue(self._default_index)
2072        self.set_format(val_fmt)
2073
2074        self._slider.valueChanged.connect(self._on_slider_value_changed)
2075
2076        self._update_all_labels()
2077        self._update_value_width()
2078        self._update_layout()

Initialize the array slider.

Args: label: Slider label text. arr_length: Number of array elements. unit: Optional unit label. min_val: Minimum array value. max_val: Maximum array value. init_index: Initial selected index. orientation: Slider orientation. val_fmt: Value display format string. show_range: Whether range labels and ticks should be shown. parent: Optional parent widget.

def evaluate_value(self, value: float) -> float: 
2080    def evaluate_value(self, value: float) -> float:
2081        """Normalize an array value using the evaluation format.
2082
2083        Args:
2084            value: Value to normalize.
2085
2086        Returns:
2087            Normalized float value.
2088        """
2089        try:
2090            return float(self._eval_fmt.format(value))
2091        except Exception:
2092            return value

Normalize an array value using the evaluation format.

Returns: Normalized float value.

def save_current_value_as_default_value(self) -> None: 
2136    def save_current_value_as_default_value(self) -> None:
2137        """Store the current slider index as the default index."""
2138        self._default_index = self._slider.value()

Store the current slider index as the default index.

2176        """Return a serializable configuration snapshot.

2183            "min_val": self._min_value,

2187        }

def get_value(self): 
2211    def get_value(self):
2212        """Return the current array-slider state.
2213
2214        Returns:
2215            Mapping containing the array length and current selected index.
2216        """
2217        return {
2218            "arr_length": len(self._arr),
2219            "index": self._slider.value(),
2220        }

Return the current array-slider state.

Returns: Mapping containing the array length and current selected index.

def set_value(self, value: Dict[str, int]) -> None: 
2222    def set_value(self, value: Dict[str, int]) -> None:
2223        """Set the array-slider state from a mapping.
2224
2225        Args:
2226            value: Mapping containing ``arr_length`` and ``index`` entries.
2227        """
2228        arr_length = value.get("arr_length", self._arr_length)
2229        if arr_length < 2:
2230            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: arr_length must be greater than 1.")
2231        index = value.get("index", self._default_index) % arr_length
2232
2233        self._arr_length = arr_length
2234        self._rebuild_arr(index)
2235        self._update_all_labels()
2236        self._update_value_width()

Set the array-slider state from a mapping.

Args: value: Mapping containing arr_length and index entries.

def set_range(self, min_val: ~TNum, max_val: ~TNum) -> None: 
2238    def set_range(self, min_val: TNum, max_val: TNum) -> None:
2239        """Update the numeric range used to generate the backing array.
2240
2241        Args:
2242            min_val: New minimum array value.
2243            max_val: New maximum array value.
2244        """
2245        if max_val < min_val:
2246            raise ValueError("ArraySlider: max_val must be >= min_val.")
2247
2248        self._min_value = min_val
2249        self._max_value = max_val
2250        self._rebuild_arr()
2251        self._update_all_labels()
2252        self._update_value_width()

Update the numeric range used to generate the backing array.

Args: min_val: New minimum array value. max_val: New maximum array value.
